name: JPA Program Penajaan Nasional (PPN)
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances, flights to US/UK
grade_description: Min 9A+ in SPM incl. BM, BI, Math, History, Add Math, Physics, Chemistry, Moral/Islamic Ed + 1 other. All other subjects min A-
notes: Only for top 20 SPM students nationwide. Covers pre-university through undergraduate at top US/UK universities. Age below 19 on 31 Dec of SPM year.

name: JPA Program Khas Lepasan SPM (Dalam Negara)
amount_description: Full — tuition + living allowance
grade_description: Min 9A+ SPM (same core subjects as PPN)
notes: For local public university studies. Also offered as Pinjaman Boleh Ubah (PBU) convertible loan under Program Khas JPA-MARA (PKJM).

name: JPA Program Khas JKPJ (Japan/Korea/France/Germany)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, language training
grade_description: Outstanding SPM — typically 9A+
notes: Covers studies in Japan, Korea, France or Germany. Includes intensive language training in-country before degree. Very limited seats — national-level selection.

name: JPA Dermasiswa B40 / PIDN
amount_description: Full or partial — income-tiered
grade_description: Min 3.50 CGPA pre-university or min 8A SPM; income verification required
notes: Targets B40 household income group. PIDN covers undergraduate degree at public universities. EA Form / salary slips required.

name: MARA Young Talent Development Programme (YTP)
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances, flights
grade_description: Min 8A+ SPM; strong co-curricular and leadership
notes: Exclusively for Bumiputera students. Pre-university (A-Level/Foundation at MARA colleges) through undergraduate at prestigious local and overseas universities. One of the most searched scholarships in Malaysia (195K+ views on competitor sites). Apply via MARA portal at my.mara.gov.my.

name: MARA Tertiary Education Sponsorship (TESP)
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Min 5 credits SPM (Diploma) / CGPA 3.00 STPM
notes: Diploma and degree at MARA colleges: MRSM, Kolej MARA, UniKL etc.

name: Khazanah Global Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition, stipend, flights, leadership programme
bond_description: Yes — job attachment at Khazanah-linked orgs
grade_description: Min 8As (A/A+) in SPM or IGCSE. Postgrad: Distinction / CGPA 3.50
notes: Three levels: (1) A-Level at KYUEM (age ≤18) → overseas degree; (2) Direct undergraduate; (3) Masters/PhD. IGCSE mock results accepted. Cannot apply for both Global and Watan in same cycle.

name: Khazanah Watan Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, accommodation, development
bond_description: Yes — bond at Khazanah GLC companies
grade_description: Min 8As (A/A+) SPM or IGCSE; CGPA 3.50 postgrad; age ≤21
notes: Local counterpart to Khazanah Global. Personal statement required: 'Why Khazanah and how you can contribute to good governance in Malaysia'. Cannot apply for both Global and Watan in same cycle.

name: PETRONAS Education Sponsorship Programme (PESP)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, return flights, books
grade_description: UTP/Local (Sci/Eng): min 8A incl Chem, Physics, Math. Overseas (Sci/Eng): min 4A+ and 4A-
notes: Post-SPM for citizens age 16–19. Studies at UTP (local) or top universities in US, UK, Australia, NZ, China, Japan, South Korea. Competitive selection camp (POW — Powering Knowledge).

name: Yayasan UEM Global Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, exam fees, insurance, laptop, allowances
bond_description: Yes — 5 yrs UEM Group; 3 yrs Wira
grade_description: Min 7As (A+/A) in SPM; excellent Form 4 & 5 track record
notes: GLOBAL track: overseas at top QS-ranked universities. WIRA track: local public universities. Fields: Business, Finance, Engineering, Accounting. Diploma and Matrikulasi leavers eligible for Wira track.

name: Yayasan TNB PRIME Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances (UNITEN/IPTA/overseas)
grade_description: Excellent SPM/pre-university results; CGPA 3.50+ recommended
notes: Three study levels: post-SPM pre-university, undergraduate, and postgraduate. Available for UNITEN, public IPTA, or overseas. Separate TNB Shine Sponsorship for well-rounded students at IPTA/UNITEN only.

name: PNB Global Scholarship Award
amount_description: Full — tuition, preparatory college, allowances, flights
grade_description: Outstanding SPM results; min 8A+ typically
notes: Recent SPM candidates attend PNB-selected local preparatory college before proceeding to undergraduate at top global universities. Covers finance, investment, and business-related fields.

name: Yayasan Sime Darby Excellence Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, board/lodging, laptop, clothing, flights
bond_description: Yes — 3 years at Sime Darby group
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.30 pre-university or 3As in A-Level; age ≤25
notes: ALL fields EXCEPT Medicine. YSD THRIVE Future Leaders programme for all scholars. Separate PWD Bursary — no bond.

name: Yayasan Telekom Malaysia Future Leaders Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Min 8A+ SPM (overseas) / min 6As SPM (local)
notes: UPU channel for public universities. Must have ≥2 academic years remaining. UEC accepted. Contact: yayasantm.edu@tm.com.my Apply for ONE programme only. Email yayasantm.edu@tm.com.my. Must not have siblings currently on YTM scholarship. Cannot simultaneously receive other education financial aid.

name: Axiata Foundation All-Star Bestari Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + living + structured development
grade_description: Excellent results; demonstrated excellence beyond academics
notes: Focuses on underprivileged and marginalised communities (B40, indigenous, OKU, orphans). 4-stage selection including online assessment.

name: Yayasan Peneraju Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Varies by programme; min 5 credits SPM for entry levels
notes: Established by PM's Department to empower Bumiputera communities. Covers undergraduate, Masters, Doctoral, and TVET programmes.

name: Bank Negara Malaysia — Kijang Pre-University Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, subsistence, related allowances
bond_description: Yes — 1 yr study = 2 yrs service at BNM
grade_description: Min 8As (A and A+ only) in SPM; strong leadership and ECA
notes: Pre-university (A-Level/Foundation) leading to undergraduate at BNM-approved universities. Assessment centre: group activities + panel interview.

name: Bank Negara Malaysia — Kijang Undergraduate Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, subsistence, return flights
bond_description: Yes — 1 yr study = 2 yrs service at BNM
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.50 pre-university; offer from BNM-approved university required
notes: Covers Harvard, LSE, Oxford, Cambridge. Psychometric + video response + assessment centre + panel interview.

name: Maybank Group Scholarship (Local Universities)
amount_description: Full — tuition, fees, living allowances
grade_description: Must be enrolled Year 1 at UM/UPM/UKM/UiTM/IIUM/USM/UTM/UUM etc; maintain CGPA ≥3.00
notes: Must already be in Year 1 at listed public universities. Household income ≤RM120,000/year. Age ≤22. Running since 1972.

name: Maybank Group Scholarship (Overseas — UK/US/Australia)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, accommodation, flights
grade_description: Currently in Foundation; accepted at top-tier UK/US/Australia university; CGPA ≥3.00
notes: Must be enrolled in Foundation at time of application. Household income ≤RM180,000/year. Age ≤22.

name: CIMB ASEAN Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + professional development + mentorship
bond_description: Yes — bond at CIMB on graduation
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.25/4.00 or equivalent; strong ECA and leadership
notes: Open to ALL ASEAN nationals. For undergraduate or Masters (min 1 full academic year remaining). Includes professional development and mentor support.

name: OCBC Bank Public Scholarship
amount_description: RM15,000 per year (public uni); RM23,000 (private uni)
bond_description: Yes — employment at OCBC Bank on graduation
grade_description: Excellent STPM or Matriculation results; CGPA ≥3.30 each semester
notes: No university admission needed at application. 800-word essay required. Cannot switch courses mid-way. Contact: MYScholarship@ocbc.com Email application to MYScholarship@ocbc.com with subject: 2026 OCBC Public Scholarship — [Your Name]. Deadline 30 June 2026. Can apply before receiving university offer letter.

name: Hong Leong Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: RM8,500/year (Diploma) · RM6,000/year (3+0 degree private)
grade_description: Good results in SPM / STPM / UEC / A-Level — more accessible bar
notes: NO BOND. For Diploma, Advanced Diploma, or 1st undergraduate degree at any Malaysian university. ANY field accepted.

name: Yayasan Bank Rakyat — BRIGHT Programme
amount_description: Convertible loan — waived based on academic performance
grade_description: Min 5As SPM / CGPA 3.00 STPM or equivalent; age ≤25
notes: BRIGHT = Biasiswa Inspirasi Bank Rakyat Memacu Bakat Tertinggi. Loan converted to scholarship based on annual results. UEC accepted.

name: Bank Pembangunan Malaysia — BAGUS Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, laptop, flights
grade_description: Excellent pre-university results; not receiving other scholarships
notes: BAGUS = BPMB Award of Group's Undergraduate Scholarship. Covers local and overseas (top 100 QS-ranked; twinning from 2026).

name: OSK Foundation Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly living allowance
bond_description: Yes — specific term at OSK Group
grade_description: Min 6As SPM or O-Levels; min 3As CGPA 3.50 STPM/A-Level equivalent
notes: Open to all ethnicities/religions. Focus on challenging socio-economic backgrounds. Household income ≤RM8,000/month. Also open to current undergraduates. Contact: osk.foundation@oskgroup.com

name: Maxis Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition + living expenses
grade_description: Excellent SPM / pre-university results; strong tech/STEM aptitude
notes: Specific fields only: Finance, Maths, Engineering, Technology. Mandatory internship at Maxis. Contact: scholar@maxis.com.my

name: Shell Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, flights
grade_description: Post-SPM track: typically 8A+–9A+. Direct degree: strong pre-university CGPA
notes: Pre-university through undergraduate at top UK/US/Australia or local (UTM/UM/UPM). Engineering-focused.

name: PTPK — Skim Pinjaman Pelajar Kemahiran (Skills Loan)
amount_description: Loan — up to RM10,000–RM40,000 for skills training programmes
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Enrolled in accredited skills training at SKM Level 1–5.
notes: Study loan from PTPK (under Ministry of Human Resources) for Malaysians pursuing vocational and skills training at public and private skills institutes. Covers fees, tools and living costs. Important for TVET students overlooked by most scholarship directories.

name: UKM Zamalah Postgraduate Research Scheme
amount_description: Tuition fee assistance + RM1,200/month GRA stipend (varies)
grade_description: Excellent academic results. Malaysian or international. Enrolled in UKM research programme.
notes: UKM's postgraduate research financial assistance for Master and PhD by research students. Includes Graduate Research Assistantship (GRA) and tuition fee waivers. Competitive — based on research area and supervisor. Apply through UKM Centre for Academic Management.

name: IJM Corporation Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
bond_description: Yes — employment at IJM or subsidiary
grade_description: Min 3As in STPM/Foundation/Matriculation/A-Level/Diploma; CGPA ≥3.60 for current undergrads
notes: Over RM6 million supporting 361 scholars since 1994. Engineering and construction focused. Must not hold other scholarship/education loan.

name: IMU (International Medical University) Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 30% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Min 9A in SPM or excellent pre-university results for medicine/health sciences.
notes: Merit-based tuition waiver at IMU, Malaysia's first and largest private medical and health sciences university. Open to Malaysian and international students. Fields: medicine, pharmacy, dentistry, nursing, health sciences, nutrition.

name: Penang Future Foundation (PFF) Scholarship
amount_description: Partial bursary — varies by programme
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.67 for current undergraduate track; other tracks vary
notes: Penang state-linked foundation targeting lower-income students. Apply: penangfuturefoundation.my

name: MAHSA University Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver (merit-based)
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM or CGPA 3.0+ in pre-university. Health and allied health fields.
notes: Merit scholarship at MAHSA University, a private university specialising in health sciences, pharmacy, dentistry, nursing, business and engineering in Jenjarom, Selangor. Multiple tiers based on SPM/pre-university results.

name: Yayasan Sarawak Scholarship (BYSTT & YBSTAR)
amount_description: Full or partial — varies by track and level
grade_description: Credit in BM in SPM; CGPA ≥3.00 for STPM/Foundation/Diploma
notes: Two tracks: BYSTT (STEM and priority fields) and YBSTAR (Non-STEM). Both local and overseas (Top 10 world universities) eligible. Part-time and distance learning NOT eligible. Apply via my-Yayasan system.

name: The Star Education Fund Scholarship
amount_description: Tuition fee waiver at partner institutions
deadline_text: Within 2 wks of SPM results / July (STPM)
grade_description: Reasonably good results in SPM/UEC (Foundation/Diploma) or STPM/UEC (Degree); active in ECA
notes: NOT a cash award — tuition fee waiver at partner colleges/universities. Living expenses NOT covered. Apply within 2 weeks of results release. Contact: edufund@thestar.com.my

name: Sin Chew Daily Education Fund
amount_description: Tuition fee waiver at participating institutions
grade_description: Good final results in SPM / A-Level / STPM / UEC; official certificate required
notes: NOT a cash award — tuition fee waiver. Living expenses excluded. Apply for 1 or 2 courses. Trial/mock results NOT accepted. Primarily catered to Chinese-medium and Chinese community applicants.

name: Taylor's University Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver — up to 100%
grade_description: Min 2As STPM / Foundation CGPA 3.50 / A-Level 2As / UEC; current undergrads CGPA ≥3.30
notes: Multiple scholarship tiers: Vice Chancellor Award, Merit Scholarship, Sports Scholarship, Talent Scholarship. IGCSE/international qualifications accepted. RM30 million in scholarships available.

name: PTPTN National Study Loan
amount_description: B40: up to 100% · M40: up to 75% · T20: up to 50%
grade_description: No minimum grade — valid offer letter required
notes: Ujrah 1% flat p.a. Covers Diploma and Degree. Foundation eligible at: MMU, UNITEN, UTP, UNITAR, UNIRAZAK only. First-Class Honours (CGPA ≥3.67) from public universities can apply to convert full loan to scholarship post-graduation (Budget 2026: B40/M40 only).

name: Chevening Scholarship (Malaysia)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, flights, visa costs
bond_description: Must return to Malaysia for min 2 years
grade_description: Undergraduate degree permitting UK Masters entry; min 2 years work experience; strong leadership potential
notes: UK Government global scholarship. One-year taught Masters at any top UK university. Malaysia is 2nd largest recipient in ASEAN. Over 2,000 Chevening alumni in Malaysia. Apply at chevening.org/scholarship/malaysia
fields: Any field — one-year taught Masters at UK university

name: Chevening-Khazanah Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, flights, visa costs
bond_description: Must return to Malaysia — standard Chevening return requirement
grade_description: Undergraduate degree permitting UK Masters entry; min 2 years work experience
notes: Joint Chevening-Khazanah award — additional funding from Yayasan Khazanah. Apply through the Chevening portal and indicate Khazanah partnership interest.
fields: Any field — one-year taught Masters at UK university

name: MyBrainSc Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly stipend + research expenses
grade_description: Strong undergraduate results; CGPA ≥3.50 recommended
notes: Supports Malaysian citizens pursuing postgraduate studies (Masters and PhD) in science and mathematics at local universities. Covers tuition, monthly allowance, and research funding.

name: Yayasan Tun Ismail (YTI/PNB) Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly allowance + development
grade_description: Excellent pre-university results; strong ECA and leadership
notes: Foundation under PNB. Undergraduate at reputable local universities. Includes personal development programme and exposure to PNB's investment management business.

name: British Council GREAT Scholarships Malaysia
amount_description: Min £10,000 towards tuition fees for one-year Masters
grade_description: Undergraduate degree; accepted at participating UK university
notes: Min £10,000 per scholarship jointly funded by UK Government and UK universities. Each participating university sets its own eligibility criteria.

name: Teach For Malaysia Fellowship
amount_description: Monthly stipend RM2,800 + benefits for 2-year teaching placement
grade_description: Malaysian. Min Bachelor's degree (any field). CGPA 3.0+. Strong leadership record.
notes: Highly competitive fellowship (acceptance rate ~5%) for talented graduates to teach in underserved Malaysian schools for 2 years as full-time teachers. Monthly stipend included. Significant career development and alumni network. Not a traditional scholarship — it's a paid fellowship.

name: Sunway University Scholarship (Jeffrey Cheah Foundation Excellence)
amount_description: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver — multiple tiers
grade_description: Outstanding results; SPM 10As / A-Level 4As / IGCSE 8A*s for top tier; lower for other tiers
notes: RM570 million awarded as of 2021. Multiple tiers including Community Scholarship (B40). Scholars-in-Residence Programme at Cambridge and Oxford for top scholars.

name: Yayasan Peneraju — Peneraju Profesional (Accounting)
amount_description: Full — professional accounting fees + allowances
grade_description: Min qualifications required for entry to selected professional accounting programme
notes: Specific Peneraju programme for professional accounting qualifications (ACCA, CIMA, CPA, ICAEW). Covers fees for the full professional qualification pathway.

name: Great Eastern Supremacy Scholarship Award
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances at Malaysian universities
bond_description: Yes — 3-year bond at Great Eastern Life
grade_description: Excellent STPM/A-Level/Foundation/Matriculation results; confirmed or conditional offer to Malaysian university
notes: Awarded annually since 1998. Over RM12 million awarded to 180+ recipients. Bond period of 3 years starts from joining date as permanent employee.

name: Sarawak Energy Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Excellent SPM/STPM/pre-university results; SPM trial results accepted
notes: Covers engineering and IT/digital fields. Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmaceutical NOT covered. EAC-accredited engineering programmes required. Contact: scholarship@sarawakenergy.com

name: Albukhary Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + living + accommodation
grade_description: Good academic results; demonstrated financial need
notes: Established by Tan Sri Syed Mokhtar Al-Bukhary. Covers studies at Albukhary International University (AIU) in Alor Setar, Kedah primarily. Targets deserving students regardless of background.

name: Tabung Pendidikan Selangor (Dana Pendidikan Selangor)
amount_description: Education loan — amount varies by programme level
grade_description: Good academic results; Selangor resident; accepted at accredited institution
notes: Selangor state education fund for residents. Apply online at danapendidikan.selangor.gov.my.

name: Yayasan Sabah Scholarship
amount_description: Full or partial — varies by programme
grade_description: Good academic results; Sabah resident; accepted at accredited institution
notes: Provided by Sabah Foundation for Sabahan students. Apply at yayasansabahgroup.org.my.
fields: Any field at public/private Higher Learning Institutions

name: Biasiswa Pendidikan Yayasan Pahang
amount_description: Varies — check Yayasan Pahang website
grade_description: Good academic results; Pahang resident; financial need considered
notes: Pahang state foundation scholarship for Pahang residents. Also offers Skim Pelajar Cemerlang and Biasiswa Tahfiz Profesional. Apply at yp.org.my

name: Yayasan Pelajaran Johor (YPJ) Education Loan
amount_description: Education loan — varies by programme
grade_description: Good academic results; Johor resident; accepted at accredited public university
notes: Yayasan Pelajaran Johor provides education loans for Johor residents at public higher learning institutions. Apply at portal.ypj.gov.my
fields: Any field at public Higher Learning Institutions

name: Yayasan Wilayah Persekutuan — Skim Bantuan Awal IPT
amount_description: Initial entry assistance — amount varies
grade_description: Good academic results; WP resident; accepted at accredited institution
notes: WP (Federal Territory) financial assistance for students entering public/private higher learning institutions. Targets WP residents especially from lower income backgrounds.

name: Japan MEXT Scholarship (Undergraduate)
provider: Japanese Ministry of Education (MEXT) — Embassy of Japan
amount_description: Full — tuition + ~¥117,000/month stipend + flights
bond_description: None — must study in Japan for full degree duration
grade_description: Excellent SPM/equivalent results; written exam + interview at Embassy of Japan KL
notes: Japanese Government scholarship. Includes 1-year Japanese language training before degree. Monthly stipend ~¥117,000. Full tuition. Return air ticket. 5–7 years total (language + degree). Apply at Embassy of Japan KL.
fields: Any undergraduate field at Japanese universities

name: Japan MEXT Scholarship (Research/Postgraduate)
provider: Japanese Ministry of Education (MEXT) — Embassy of Japan
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend (~¥143,000–¥145,000), flights
grade_description: Undergraduate degree; research proposal required; interview at Embassy
notes: For Masters and PhD at Japanese universities. Two tracks: Embassy Recommendation and University Recommendation. Monthly stipend ~¥143,000–¥145,000. Full tuition. Return air ticket. Apply at Embassy of Japan KL.
fields: Any postgraduate field at Japanese universities

name: Australia Awards Scholarship (Malaysia)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, flights, health cover
bond_description: Must return to Malaysia for min 2 years after studies
grade_description: Strong undergraduate academic record; demonstrated leadership; IELTS 6.5 recommended
notes: Australian Government's flagship international scholarship for postgraduate studies (Masters primarily) at Australian universities. Covers full tuition, return air travel, living allowance, health cover. Apply via Australia Awards website.
fields: Any field aligned with Australia-Malaysia priorities

name: Monash University Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver — up to 100%
grade_description: Strong academic results; SPM/STPM/A-Level/UEC/IGCSE; strong leadership and ECA
notes: Multiple scholarship programmes for undergraduate at Monash Malaysia (Sunway Campus). Merit-based tuition fee waivers. Also offers postgraduate research scholarships.

name: HELP University Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Good academic results; varies by scholarship tier
notes: HELP University-specific. Merit-based scholarships and bursaries for undergraduate studies. Multiple scholarship categories.

name: APU (Asia Pacific University) Scholarship
provider: Asia Pacific University of Technology & Innovation
amount_description: Partial tuition fee waiver — up to 50%+
grade_description: Good academic results; UEC Merit Scholarship available for UEC students
notes: Multiple scholarship tiers. UEC Merit Scholarship specifically for UEC students (up to 50% off). International student scholarships available.

name: MMU (Multimedia University) Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Good to excellent academic results; CGPA targets vary by tier
notes: MMU offers merit-based scholarships for undergraduate studies at Cyberjaya and Melaka campuses. MMU is one of the PTPTN-eligible Foundation institutions.

name: UCSI University Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver — up to 100%
grade_description: Good to excellent academic results; varies by scholarship tier
notes: UCSI-specific scholarships. Strong in health sciences (Medicine, Nursing, Pharmacy) and creative fields (Music, Culinary Arts).

name: INTI International University Scholarship
amount_description: Partial tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Good academic results; varies by scholarship category
notes: INTI-specific tuition fee scholarships. Multiple campuses (Nilai, Subang, Penang, Sabah). Merit-based.

name: Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman (UTAR) Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Good to excellent academic results; UEC students especially welcomed
notes: UTAR is a prominent private university associated with MCA. Strong UEC intake and significant UEC Merit Scholarships available. Strongly associated with Chinese Malaysian community.

name: TAR UMT Scholarship
provider: Tunku Abdul Rahman University of Management & Technology
amount_description: Merit scholarships — partial tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Strong academic results; STPM/A-Level/UEC/Foundation; sports/national athletes also eligible
notes: TAR UMT (formerly Tunku Abdul Rahman College). Strongly associated with MCA/Chinese community education. Separate bursary for state and national athletes. UEC students well-supported.

name: Kuok Foundation Scholarship (All Awards)
amount_description: RM15,000–RM18,000/yr; up to RM50,000/yr (private uni loan-grant)
grade_description: Consistent and outstanding academic results; strong leadership and ECA; demonstrated financial need
notes: One of Malaysia's oldest philanthropic foundations, est. 1970 by the Kuok family (Robert Kuok). Three scholarship types: (1) Kuok Keng Kang — RM18,000/yr, outstanding academic + leadership; (2) Kuok Khoon Hong — RM15,000/yr, excellent academic + ECA; (3) Wilmar Scholarships — RM18,000/yr. Also KF Loan-Grant Awards for private universities (up to RM50,000/yr). Applications open June annually. Printed form must be mailed to Foundation office after online submission. Diploma, Foundation, off-campus, and twinning students are NOT eligible.

name: YTL Foundation Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition + living allowance; 1 overseas seat/yr at top university
bond_description: Yes — 5 yrs local public, 6 yrs local private
grade_description: Strong academic results; humanitarian and leadership qualities; family must find financing challenging; age not specified
notes: Founded 1997 by YTL Corp / Yeoh Tiong Lay family. Two scholarship levels: (1) Local undergraduate at public/private Malaysian universities — full tuition + living allowance, must demonstrate financial need; (2) Overseas Scholarship — only ONE seat awarded per year at a top-ranked foreign university, any course. Bond: 5 years (local public) or 6 years (local private). 2026 application currently open at ytlfoundation.org.

name: Jeffrey Cheah Foundation Scholarship (JCF)
amount_description: Full tuition + development programme; B40 community: full tuition
bond_description: None for Community Scholarship; some programmes have service commitment
grade_description: Outstanding results; strong ECA and leadership; age ≤25
notes: One of Malaysia's largest education foundations — over RM570 million awarded. Founded by Tan Sri Jeffrey Cheah (Sunway Group). Multiple tiers: (1) JCF-Sunway Group Scholarship; (2) Jeffrey Cheah Community Scholarship (full tuition, B40, income <RM5k/month); (3) Chevening/JCF Scholarship (Masters at Oxford/Cambridge/Lancaster, medical/life sciences, 1 seat/yr). Studies primarily at Sunway University / Monash University Malaysia.

name: IOI Foundation Scholarship
provider: IOI Foundation / IOI Group (Yayasan Tan Sri Lee Shin Cheng)
amount_description: Tuition fees + allowances
bond_description: Internship at IOI Group; employment opportunity offered
grade_description: Strong academic results; active co-curricular; financial need
notes: Named after IOI Group founder Tan Sri Lee Shin Cheng. Applications typically open April–June annually. Internship and career opportunities within IOI Group upon graduation. Contact: yayasan@ioigroup.com or 03-8947 6605.

name: Yayasan KLK Scholarship
amount_description: RM13,000/year (public universities) or RM20,000/year (private universities)
bond_description: 3-year employment bond with KLK Group upon graduation
grade_description: STPM/A-Levels minimum 2As, or Foundation minimum CGPA 3.5. Good command of English. Active in co-curricular activities.
notes: Open to all Malaysian citizens. Undergraduate studies at local institutions only. Preferred fields: Agriculture, Engineering (Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical), Sustainability/Environmental Science. Scholars undergo practical training with KLK during studies. Apply by downloading form from klk.com.my and emailing to yayasan@klk.com.my. Bond requires working anywhere in the KLK Group upon graduation.

name: SEGi University Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Malaysian student. Minimum results vary by programme and scholarship tier.
notes: Merit scholarships at SEGi University in Petaling Jaya (and other campuses) covering medicine, nursing, pharmacy, engineering, business, IT and design. Multiple tiers including Early Bird Scholarship. One of Malaysia's larger private universities.

name: Lion-Parkson Foundation Scholarship
provider: Lion-Parkson Foundation (Lion Group / William Cheng family)
bond_description: Yes — bond period equivalent to course duration at Lion Group
grade_description: Min 3As & 1B STPM / CGPA 3.50 Matriculation or Diploma / min 5As UEC; active sports & ECA
notes: RM10,000/yr for full-time first degree at local public and private universities. Local only. Total contribution exceeds RM9.7 million to 427+ students. Submit online at lion.com.my before April closing date.

name: Gamuda Scholarship (Yayasan Gamuda)
amount_description: Full — tuition + living + internship + job placement
bond_description: Yes — bond to serve Gamuda Group upon graduation
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.40 / 3As in STPM or equivalent; strong leadership
notes: Running since 1996 — over 640 scholars. Covers top public/private universities and branch campuses. Engineering fields: Civil, Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Mechatronics. Also QS, Architecture, Urban Planning, Property, Accounting, HR, Business IT, Psychology. Internship and structured job placement at Gamuda Group. UEC accepted. Financial need required. Apply via gamuda.com/scholarship.

name: Genting Malaysia Scholarship Award (GENM)
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances (local & selected overseas)
bond_description: Yes — employment bond at Genting Malaysia
grade_description: Excellent pre-university results; active leadership in ECA
notes: Online application only — no hard copies. Optional video resume (Vsume, >60 seconds) encouraged. Enquiries: scholarship@rwgenting.com. Closes approximately mid-August annually. Local and selected overseas universities.

name: Panasonic Scholarship Malaysia
amount_description: Tuition + allowances
grade_description: Strong pre-university results; interest in electronics/manufacturing
notes: Annual scholarship by Panasonic's Malaysian operations. Focus on engineering and technology fields aligned with electronics/manufacturing. Check Panasonic Malaysia website or malaysiascholarships.my for current cycle details.

name: KPMG Young Star Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Financial support + internship + MICPA sponsorship
bond_description: Yes — job offer commitment at KPMG Malaysia
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.50 pre-university; leadership in ECA; Accounting/Finance background
notes: For undergraduate students in their penultimate year — must have at least 1 full academic year remaining. Benefits: financial support, guaranteed internship, job offer, and full MICPA (Malaysian Institute of Certified Public Accountants) sponsorship. Strong pathway into Big Four accounting career. Check kpmg.com/my for 2026 cycle.

name: Yayasan Bursa Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Full scholarship — tuition covered
grade_description: Good academic results; active ECA/sports; leadership skills
notes: Since 2006, awarding full scholarships to underprivileged students for local public universities. Preference: Law, Finance, Accountancy, Economics, Business Administration, Sustainability. Must be below 22 years old. Apply via Microsoft Form and email to YBMScholarship@bursamalaysia.com.

name: Cagamas Scholarship Programme
provider: Cagamas Berhad (National Mortgage Corporation of Malaysia)
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Excellent academic results; strong leadership and ECA
notes: Cagamas is Malaysia's national mortgage corporation. Full scholarship including tuition and allowances. Apply via scholarship.cagamas.com.my — check for current cycle as deadline is approximately July annually.

name: PIDM Undergraduate Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Currently enrolled undergraduate — good CGPA required
notes: PIDM is Malaysia's deposit insurance and takaful protection agency. Important: scholarship is for students ALREADY enrolled in an undergraduate degree — NOT for SPM leavers or fresh pre-U graduates. Download application from pidm.gov.my/en/more/undergraduate-scholarship-programme.

name: Sabah State Education Fund (TPNS) / Yayasan Sabah
amount_description: Tuition + allowances; enhanced package for CGPA 4.0 students
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.00 Foundation/Diploma; CGPA 4.0 achievers get enhanced award
notes: Launched 2022 under Sabah Maju Jaya (SMJ) Roadmap. Single portal for all major Sabah sponsors: apply via Sabah Education Sponsorship Portal at ptps.sabah.gov.my. Priority to B40 households.

name: Penang Future Foundation (PFF) — Penang Scholar
provider: Penang State Government / Penang Future Foundation
amount_description: 'Penang Scholar': tuition up to RM100,000 + monthly allowance
bond_description: Yes — must work in Penang upon graduation (any organisation of choice)
grade_description: Completed Diploma/Pre-U before applying; min CGPA 3.67 if currently enrolled
notes: Open to ALL Malaysians (not just Penangites). STEM, Engineering, IT, Maths, Accountancy/Finance only — Medicine excluded. Bond requires working in Penang post-graduation. Cannot hold other financial assistance concurrently.

name: Zamalah University Research Scholarship
provider: Malaysian Public Universities (UM, UKM, UPM, UTM, UiTM, etc.)
amount_description: Monthly stipend RM1,000–RM1,800 + partial/full tuition waiver
grade_description: First-class or Second-class Upper for Masters entry; CGPA 3.00+ for PhD
notes: Zamalah refers to internal research assistantship/scholarship schemes at Malaysian public universities. Each university operates its own scheme via its Research Management Centre (RMC). Available at UM, UKM, UPM, UTM, UiTM and others. Typically requires enrolment in research-based programme.

name: Yayasan Tunku Abdul Rahman (YTAR) Scholarship
amount_description: Full scholarship + leadership development programme
grade_description: Excellent academic results; strong leadership track record
notes: Comprehensive leadership scholarship with dedicated leadership development programme. Multiple sub-scholarships: GrabScholar x YTAR (with Grab), TIE x YTAR (Asia Philanthropy Circle), AHAM x YTAR (asset management). 2026 deadline: 8 April 2026. Apply via yayasantar.org.my. Virtual interviews for shortlisted candidates.

name: KUIS (Kolej Universiti Islam Antarabangsa Selangor) Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition fee reduction
grade_description: Malaysian Muslim students. Financial need and academic merit.
notes: Merit and need-based scholarship at KUIS in Kajang, Selangor, a private Islamic university affiliated with the Selangor Islamic Religious Council (MAIS). Covers Islamic studies, education, business and social sciences.

name: UniSZA Merit Award (Universiti Sultan Zainal Abidin)
amount_description: Partial — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Terengganu residency an advantage.
notes: Merit scholarship at UniSZA in Gong Badak and Besut, Terengganu. Focuses on Islamic sciences, health sciences, business and technology. Priority to students from Terengganu and the East Coast.

name: UniMAP Merit Scholarship (Universiti Malaysia Perlis)
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Engineering and technology preferred.
notes: Merit scholarship at UniMAP in Perlis, Malaysia's smallest state. Specialises in microelectronics, telecommunications, mechatronics and advanced engineering. Apply through UniMAP Student Affairs Division.

name: UMK Merit Award (Universiti Malaysia Kelantan)
amount_description: Partial — tuition and monthly allowance
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Kelantan residency an advantage.
notes: Merit scholarship at UMK in Bachok, Kelantan. Specialises in entrepreneurship, agribusiness, creative technology and veterinary medicine. Priority to students from Kelantan and the East Coast of Peninsular Malaysia.

name: Lincoln University College Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 50% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Excellent SPM/pre-university results. Open to Malaysian and international students.
notes: Merit scholarship at Lincoln University College in Petaling Jaya, a private university known for medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, law, business and IT. Multiple scholarship tiers for Malaysian and international students.

name: Yayasan Didik Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition and living assistance
grade_description: Malaysian student from low-income background. Any field.
notes: Education foundation focused on providing financial assistance to deserving Malaysian students who cannot afford higher education. Particularly active in helping students from marginalised communities access university education.

name: Merdeka Award Grant for International Attachment (Postgraduate)
amount_description: RM35,000 grant for 3–6 months international research attachment
grade_description: Malaysian researchers/academics. PhD or senior researcher level.
notes: Prestigious grant from the Merdeka Award Trust (sponsored by Shell, Petronas, Sime Darby) for Malaysian researchers to undertake short-term international research attachments at world-class institutions. Builds research capacity and international collaboration.

name: Japan ICU Foundation Scholarship (International Christian University)
amount_description: Full — tuition, room & board at ICU Tokyo for 1 academic year
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Age 17–22. Strong English and interest in liberal arts. Excellent academic record.
notes: Full scholarship for young Malaysians to study at International Christian University in Tokyo, Japan for one year as part of their international student programme. Covers full tuition, room and board. Foundation selects 1–2 Malaysian students annually.

name: Commonwealth Scholarship & Fellowship Plan (CSFP)
provider: Association of Commonwealth Universities (ACU) / UK Government
amount_description: Full — tuition, stipend, return flights, thesis grant
bond_description: Must return to home country for min 2 years
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; research proposal required for PhD
notes: UK-funded Masters and PhD scholarships for Commonwealth citizens including Malaysians. Nominating body in Malaysia is the British Council Malaysia. Fields prioritised: science & technology, health systems, strengthening global institutions, climate change. Apply through British Council Malaysia — nomination is required before formal application.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees (EMJMD)
amount_description: Full — tuition, €1,000/month living allowance, travel allowance
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; IELTS/TOEFL required; programme-specific requirements
notes: EU-funded joint Masters programmes across multiple European universities. Malaysians are eligible as non-EU 'Partner Country' students and receive full Erasmus Mundus scholarships. Study in 2–4 European countries. Competitive — typically 10–20% acceptance rate. Search programmes at erasmus-mundus.ec.europa.eu. Fields range from engineering to social sciences to arts.

name: DAAD Scholarship (Germany) — Study Scholarships
amount_description: Full — €934/month (Masters) or €1,200/month (PhD) + travel
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree (CGPA ≥3.50 recommended); German language (if relevant) or English-taught programmes available
notes: Germany's premier scholarship for international students. Many German Masters programmes are taught in English — no German required for those. Monthly stipend includes health, accident, and personal liability insurance. Also covers German language courses. Apply via daad.de/en. DAAD Malaysia office can advise on applications.

name: Korean Government Scholarship Program (KGSP / GKS)
provider: Korean National Institute for International Education (NIIED)
amount_description: Full — tuition waived + KRW 900,000–1,000,000/month + flights
grade_description: Strong academic results; competitive national selection through Malaysian embassy
notes: Korean Government's flagship international scholarship — formerly called KGSP, now GKS. Covers undergraduate, Masters, and PhD. Includes 1-year Korean language training. Embassy track: apply through Korean Embassy KL. University track: apply directly to specific Korean universities. Over 200 Malaysian scholars studying in Korea annually.

name: Taiwan ICDF Scholarship
provider: International Cooperation and Development Fund (Taiwan ICDF) / Taiwan Government
amount_description: Full — tuition waived + monthly allowance + return flights
grade_description: Good to excellent academic results; motivation letter required
notes: Taiwan's official development scholarship — open to Malaysian citizens. Study at universities in Taiwan. Covers Bachelors, Masters, PhD, and professional development programmes. Apply online via Taiwan ICDF portal. Note: Taiwan and Malaysia maintain unofficial relations — programme may be referred to as 'Chinese Taipei' in some contexts.

name: NUS (National University of Singapore) Research Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition waived + SGD 1,500–2,500/month stipend
deadline_text: November (for August intake); May (for January intake)
grade_description: First-class honours equivalent; CGPA ≥3.50; strong research background or publications
notes: Malaysians are among the largest group of international postgraduate students at NUS. Research Scholarship for PhD and research Masters. NUS also offers Lee Kuan Yew Scholarship (undergrad, separate award). Apply through NUS Graduate Admissions portal. GRE/GMAT may be required depending on programme.

name: NTU Research Excellence Scholarship (Singapore)
amount_description: Full — tuition waived, SGD 2,000–2,200/month stipend
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; research publications/experience preferred
notes: NTU Singapore's research scholarship for PhD candidates and research Masters. Malaysians constitute a large portion of NTU's international student population. Apply through NTU's Graduate Admissions portal. Scholarship includes monthly stipend, full tuition waiver, and NTU dormitory facilities at subsidised rates.

name: KAIST International Student Scholarship (Korea)
provider: Korea Advanced Institute of Science & Technology (KAIST)
amount_description: Full — tuition waived, KRW 350,000–1,000,000/month stipend
grade_description: Excellent results; admission to KAIST required; English-taught programmes available
notes: One of Asia's top tech universities. All programmes taught in English. KAIST is ranked among world's top 50 engineering universities. Undergraduate: all courses in English, tuition fully waived, monthly stipend. PhD: full tuition + stipend. Masters: partial to full funding. Apply directly via KAIST admissions portal.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
provider: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation / Cambridge University
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, return flights, visa
grade_description: Exceptional undergraduate results; research proposal (PhD); intellectual ability and commitment to improving lives of others
notes: Extremely competitive global scholarship — approximately 80 scholars per year worldwide. Must be applying to Cambridge independently AND be nominated for Gates Cambridge. Criteria: outstanding intellect, leadership, commitment to improving lives of others, fit with Cambridge. Apply simultaneously to Cambridge admissions and Gates Cambridge. Annually ~1–3 Malaysians awarded.

name: Rhodes Scholarship
amount_description: Full — Oxford tuition fees, living allowance, flights, visa
grade_description: First-class equivalent undergraduate; strong extracurricular profile; leadership evidence; typically GPA 3.70+
notes: Oldest international scholarship in the world (est. 1902). One of the most prestigious. Malaysia has its own constituency — typically 2 scholars selected per year. Criteria: literary and scholastic attainments; energy of character and instincts to lead; truth, courage, devotion to duty, sympathy for and protection of the weak; moral force and instincts. Apply through Rhodes Malaysia.
fields: Any field at Oxford University — Masters or DPhil (PhD)

name: ADB–Japan Scholarship Program (JSP)
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, housing, travel
bond_description: Must return to home country for 2 years
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; CGPA ≥3.00 or equivalent; admitted to ADB-designated institution
notes: Masters scholarships at ADB-designated universities in Asia-Pacific (include NUS, ANU, Seoul National, Tokyo, Hitotsubashi, Melbourne, etc.). Malaysia is an ADB developing member country — citizens are eligible. Focus on development-oriented fields. Apply through the specific ADB-designated institution you wish to attend.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship Programme
amount_description: 50% grant + 50% interest-free loan; covers tuition + living
grade_description: Strong undergraduate; demonstrated financial need essential; commitment to development
notes: 50% scholarship + 50% interest-free loan structure — loan portion can be converted based on performance. Study at top universities worldwide. Strong preference for candidates with financial need and who intend to work in developing countries. Apply via AKF Malaysia regional office. Annual deadline approximately March each year.

name: Schwarzman Scholars (China — Tsinghua University)
amount_description: Full — tuition, board, flights, living stipend
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; leadership evidence essential; English-taught programme
notes: Named after Stephen Schwarzman (Blackstone). 1-year interdisciplinary Masters at Tsinghua University Beijing. Focuses on leadership and understanding China's role in global affairs. All instruction in English. ~200 scholars selected worldwide per year. Essay, video, and interviews required. Strong network — Schwarzman alumni go into business, government, and civil society.

name: University of Edinburgh Global Research Scholarships
amount_description: Full — tuition waived + £15,000+/year living stipend
grade_description: First-class equivalent; research proposal required; may need GRE
notes: University of Edinburgh offers several PhD scholarships open to international students including Malaysians: Edinburgh Global Research Scholarships, Principal's Career Development Scholarship, and various faculty-level scholarships. Apply simultaneously for admission and scholarship via EUCLID system. One of UK's top universities (Russell Group).

name: POSTECH Scholarship (Korea)
amount_description: Full — tuition waived + KRW 400,000–1,000,000/month stipend
grade_description: Excellent STEM results; admission to POSTECH required
notes: One of Asia's leading STEM universities — often ranked among world's top 100. Exclusively science & engineering. English-medium instruction available. Fully funded PhD with monthly stipend. Undergraduate international scholarships also available. Apply via POSTECH international admissions.

name: Huawei Seeds for the Future Programme
amount_description: Fully funded tech training in China + internship pathway
grade_description: CGPA ≥3.00; demonstrated passion for ICT and technology
notes: Huawei's global flagship CSR programme — not a degree scholarship but a prestigious tech immersion in Beijing/Shenzhen + career development. Selected students attend courses at Huawei HQ on ICT, AI, cloud computing. Career pathway into Huawei. Over 10,000 students globally since 2008. Applied through Huawei Malaysia. Strong door-opener for tech careers.

name: MEXT Scholarship — Teacher Training / College of Technology
provider: Japanese Ministry of Education (MEXT) — Embassy of Japan
amount_description: Full — tuition waived, ¥117,000/month stipend, return flights
grade_description: Good SPM results; written exam + interview at Embassy of Japan KL
notes: Japanese Government MEXT for specialised training college (Senshu Gakko) or college of technology (Kosen). Different track from main undergraduate MEXT. 3–4 years. Includes Japanese language training. Good for vocational/technical pathways. Apply at Embassy of Japan KL — different deadline from main MEXT.

name: Open Society Foundations Scholarship (OSF)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, travel, health insurance
bond_description: None — expected to work for societal change
deadline_text: Varies by specific programme — typically October–February
grade_description: Strong undergraduate; demonstrated commitment to social justice and democratic values
notes: OSF runs multiple scholarship programmes: OSI Global Supplementary Grant Program (SGP), Roma Higher Education Initiative (for Roma students), various fellowships. Malaysians can apply to programmes not limited by nationality. Focus on students committed to social justice, democracy, rule of law. Also funds Global Education Program, Human Rights Initiative. Check opensocietyfoundations.org for current opportunities.

name: Jardine Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + living + travel at Oxford or Cambridge
grade_description: Predicted A*AA–A*A*A at A-Level or equivalent; outstanding academic and personal profile
notes: One of the UK's most prestigious undergraduate scholarships. For SE Asian and Hong Kong students to study at Oxford or Cambridge. Jardine Foundation interviews candidates — shortlisted applicants are sponsored through their Oxford/Cambridge application. Covers full degree (3–4 years). Extremely competitive — typically 5–10 scholars per year from SE Asia. Apply via Jardine Foundation website.

name: MasterCard Foundation Scholars Program
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, technology, travel, health insurance
bond_description: Commitment to giving back to community
grade_description: Strong secondary / pre-university results; demonstrated leadership; financial need
notes: MasterCard Foundation's flagship programme — primarily targets African students but Malaysian students may be eligible through partner universities that accept global applicants (e.g., University of Edinburgh, Ashesi University, USIU-Africa). Check individual partner university eligibility. Strong emphasis on leadership and giving back.

name: Biasiswa Yang Di-Pertuan Agong (BYDPA)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living, flights (overseas) or tuition + allowances (local)
grade_description: Outstanding pre-university results — CGPA 3.90+ or equivalent; strong leadership
notes: JPA-administered royal scholarship — one of Malaysia's most prestigious awards. Offered to outstanding pre-university graduates. Covers study at top-ranked universities worldwide. Highly competitive selection — national-level assessment. Check JPA's official penajaan portal for current cycle details.

name: JPA Program Khas Perubatan, Pergigian & Farmasi (PPF)
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.90 pre-university; strong science track
notes: Separate JPA sponsorship specifically for Medicine, Dentistry, and Pharmacy at Malaysian public universities. Distinct from the general PPN/LSPM tracks. Applications typically open January annually. Requires pre-university offer from a public university medical/pharmacy programme.

name: KPM Biasiswa Perguruan Persekutuan (ISMP)
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly allowance (teacher training bond)
bond_description: Yes — mandatory teaching service 10 years in Malaysian public schools
grade_description: Excellent pre-university results; strong personal statement about teaching vocation
notes: Ministry of Education scholarship for the Ijazah Sarjana Muda Pendidikan (ISMP) — undergraduate degree in teaching. Funded place at public university to produce qualified teachers. 10-year teaching bond at public schools. Applications open January annually via KPM portal. Covers all education specialisations.

name: Malaysian International Scholarship (MIS)
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly allowance for international postgrads to study IN Malaysia
bond_description: Must return to home country after studies
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree (CGPA ≥3.00); research proposal required for PhD
notes: MIS is a Malaysian Government initiative to attract international talent to study at Malaysian public universities. Covers postgraduate (Masters and PhD) at selected Malaysian IPTA. Unlike other entries in this directory which are FOR Malaysians, MIS is specifically for international students choosing to study IN Malaysia. Relevant for Malaysians who know international friends seeking Malaysian postgraduate study.

name: RHB Foundation xCEL Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly living allowance
bond_description: Yes — service bond at RHB Group
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.50 pre-university; active in ECA and leadership
notes: RHB Banking Group's flagship undergraduate scholarship programme. Full coverage including tuition fees and monthly living allowance. Strong pathway into banking and finance careers. Apply via rhbfoundation.rhbgroup.com. Check for 2026 cycle opening dates.

name: MNRB Scholarship Fund
amount_description: Full — tuition + allowances at local universities
grade_description: Min 6As SPM or equivalent; strong academic + ECA record
notes: Established 1998. MNRB is Malaysia's national reinsurance group. Open to SPM leavers, students pursuing or intending to pursue local university studies. Deadline approximately within 2 weeks after SPM results. Also open to current undergraduates at local/selected private with twinning. Apply at mnrb.com.my/careers/scholarships.

name: Top Glove Foundation Scholarship
provider: Top Glove Foundation / Top Glove Corporation
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly living allowance
bond_description: Varies — potential employment opportunity at Top Glove
grade_description: Strong academic results; active ECA; demonstrated financial need
notes: Top Glove Foundation (world's largest glove manufacturer) scholarship for deserving Malaysian students. Focus on health sciences, engineering and business. Apply via topglove.com foundation page.

name: Senheng Education Assistance (SEA)
amount_description: Partial — education assistance/bursary
grade_description: Good academic results; active ECA
notes: Senheng Electric is one of Malaysia's largest consumer electronics retail chains. SEA (Senheng Education Assistance) provides education support for aspiring students. Check Senheng's website or Malaysian scholarship portals for current cycle details.

name: Yayasan JCorp Scholarship (Johor Corporation)
amount_description: Education assistance — varies by programme
grade_description: Good academic results; Johor connection preferred; active ECA
notes: Johor Corporation (JCorp) is a Johor state-linked conglomerate with businesses in property, healthcare, food, and plantation. Yayasan JCorp provides education assistance for deserving students especially from Johor. Apply via yayasanjcorp.com.my.

name: Yayasan DayaDiri (YDD) Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition at partner institutions + monthly allowance
grade_description: Excellent results; strong extracurricular profile; leadership qualities
notes: YDD (Yayasan DayaDiri) scholarship for post-SPM and undergraduate students at partner institutions including Monash University Malaysia, Sunway University, Taylor's University. Approved fields include Business, IT (AI, Data Analytics, Networking), and Finance at selected degree programmes. 2026 deadline: approximately 12 April 2026. Apply at ydd.org.my.

name: Budimas Charitable Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly living allowance
grade_description: Good academic results; demonstrated financial hardship
notes: Established 2020. Budimas focuses on providing underprivileged Malaysian children — including orphans and those from extremely low-income families — the opportunity to pursue higher education. Fully funded scholarship including living expenses. Apply via budimas.org.my.

name: Yayasan Perak Education Fund
amount_description: Education loan/bursary — varies by programme
bond_description: Loan — repayment required; some grants for top students
grade_description: Good academic results; Perak connection required
notes: Perak state foundation for Perak residents. Also provides Insentif Siswa Yayasan Perak incentive for first-class graduates. Apply via yayasanperak.gov.my.

name: Yayasan Kelantan (YAKIN) Education Loan
amount_description: Education loan — amount varies by level
grade_description: Good academic results; Kelantan connection required
notes: Kelantan state education loan for students with Kelantan origin. Apply via espmb.com/yakin or Yayasan Kelantan portal. Covers Diploma and Degree at accredited Malaysian institutions.

name: Tabung Amanah Pendidikan Negeri Melaka (TAPEM)
amount_description: Education loan — varies by programme
grade_description: Good academic results; Melaka connection required; accepted at accredited institution
notes: Melaka state education loan for Melaka residents. Apply via tapem.melaka.gov.my. Covers Diploma and Degree programmes at Malaysian institutions.

name: Pinjaman Pelajaran Yayasan Selangor
amount_description: Education loan — varies by programme
grade_description: Good academic results; Selangor connection required
notes: Distinct from the Tabung Pendidikan Selangor (Dana Pendidikan Selangor). Yayasan Selangor specifically provides a student loan programme. Apply via yayasanselangor.org.my.

name: Yayasan ANGKASA Education Loan
amount_description: Education loan — varies by programme and level
grade_description: Good academic results; accepted at accredited institution
notes: Yayasan ANGKASA provides education financing for Malaysian students through the national cooperative movement. Priority given to children of cooperative members. Apply via yayasanangkasa.coop.

name: ASEAN Scholarship (Singapore MOE)
amount_description: Full — school fees, accommodation, living allowance, return flights
bond_description: None — no work bond to Singapore
grade_description: Outstanding O-Level / IGCSE results equivalent; excellent co-curricular profile
notes: Singapore Ministry of Education scholarship for Malaysian students to pursue secondary education (Year 3–4) or pre-university (Year 5–6 / JC) at top Singapore schools. Includes Raffles Institution, Hwa Chong, National JC, Victoria JC and others. No bond required to work in Singapore. Very competitive — typically 150–200 Malaysians selected per year. Apply via MOE Singapore website.
fields: Pre-university studies at top Singapore schools — any stream

name: Kuok Foundation British Universities Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly stipend at UK universities
grade_description: Excellent A-Level / pre-university results; accepted at UK university; financial need demonstrated
notes: Distinct from the Kuok Foundation local undergraduate award. This full-ride scholarship is specifically for Malaysian students pursuing undergraduate degrees at British universities. Covers full tuition + monthly stipend. Est. 1970 Kuok family foundation. Financial need is a key criterion. Apply via kuokfoundation.com — check for current UK scholarship cycle separate from local scholarship applications.

name: Yayasan PEMENANG Scholarship (Penang Malay Association)
amount_description: Bursary — amount varies
grade_description: Good academic results; Penang Malay community connection
notes: Persatuan Melayu Pulau Pinang (Penang Malay Association) scholarship/bursary for Penang Malay community students. Apply via pemenang.org.my.

name: Khazanah-CIMB Foundation Islamic Finance Scholarship (Postgrad)
amount_description: Full — tuition + living allowance at partner institutions
grade_description: Strong undergraduate degree; accepted at partner institution; relevant field background
notes: Joint postgraduate scholarship for Islamic finance and economics studies at leading institutions. Covers Masters programmes at INCEIF, Durham, Exeter, and other Islamic finance-focused universities. Check Yayasan Khazanah and CIMB Foundation websites for latest cycle.

name: Yayasan Peneraju Postgraduate (Masters/PhD)
amount_description: Full — tuition + monthly stipend for Masters and PhD
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.00 at degree level; strong academic and leadership profile
notes: Yayasan Peneraju extends its scholarships to postgraduate level for Bumiputera students. Covers Masters and PhD at Malaysian public universities and selected private institutions. Rolling applications — check yayasanpeneraju.com.my for current batch.

name: BPMB BAGUS Scholarship 2026
amount_description: Full tuition + monthly subsistence allowance. Bond: 3–6 years BPMB service.
grade_description: Min 7As SPM or equivalent. Strong co-curriculars. Twinning programmes eligible if partner uni is top 100 QS.
notes: Email application to BAGUS@bpmb.com.my by 31 May 2026. Forecast results accepted. BAGUS UMMAH track for asnaf students. Year 1 undergrads may also apply.

name: Yayasan Tenaga Nasional (YTN) Shine Scholarship
amount_description: Partial scholarship: tuition + monthly allowance. Local universities. TNB internship included.
grade_description: CGPA min 3.50 for Diploma/STPM/Matrikulasi track. Age below 23. Interest in energy industry required.
notes: Shine track for Diploma, STPM, or Matrikulasi graduates. Local university. Includes TNB industrial training placement.

name: MNRB Scholarship Fund 2026
amount_description: Partial to full scholarship: tuition + allowances for local unis and selected private twinning programmes.
grade_description: SPM leavers and current undergrads at local or selected private twinning universities. Deadline extended for 2026.
notes: Established 1998 to develop insurance and reinsurance sector talent. Deadline extended for 2026 — check official portal for current closing date.

name: Karangkraf Scholarship
amount_description: Scholarship covering Foundation, Diploma, and Degree studies at partner institutions.
grade_description: Open to SPM, STPM, and Diploma holders. All Malaysian citizens. Rolling applications.
notes: Education Fund by Karangkraf Media Group. 108K+ views on competitor. Rolling — no fixed deadline. Check karangkraf.com for current intake.

name: Bantuan Zakat IPTA/IPTS MAIDAM 2026
provider: Majlis Agama Islam dan Adat Melayu Terengganu (MAIDAM)
amount_description: Financial aid grant for initial university fees and allowances for asnaf and B40 students entering IPTA or IPTS.
grade_description: Muslim B40 and asnaf students with IPTA/IPTS offer. Financial need is primary criteria. Terengganu-based applicants.
notes: Non-scholarship financial aid — covers initial study expenses. Apply directly with MAIDAM office with university offer letter. 185K+ views on competitor.

name: JPA Program Ijazah Dalam Negara (PIDN) 2026
amount_description: Pinjaman Boleh Ubah (convertible loan) for local public universities, Premier Polytechnics, and GLU.
grade_description: First degree students at local public unis (UA), Premier Polytechnics, or Government-Linked Universities. Min 7As recommended.
notes: Opened 13 January 2026. Convertible loan — different from JPA overseas PPN. Apply: esilav2.jpa.gov.my. Enquiries: 03-88853297 or pidn2026@jpa.gov.my.

name: Biasiswa Khas Dato' Menteri Besar Selangor
amount_description: Covers tuition and living allowance — local and overseas including Middle East
grade_description: Strong academic record required. Priority for candidates proficient in more than one international language and active in co-curricular or community activities.
notes: Open to Rakyat DYMM Sultan Selangor — applicant and parents must be Malaysian citizens AND born/living in Selangor for 10+ years. Despite being state-funded, open to ALL races. Covers Degree, Masters and PhD at top 100 QS-ranked universities in Egypt, Jordan, Morocco and selected countries. Age limit: under 40 at time of study. Full scholarship covering tuition, living allowance, accommodation and other expenses. Apply at: edanapendidikan.selangor.gov.my

name: PAUM Education Fund (Persatuan Alumni Universiti Malaya)
amount_description: Partial — one-time education grant
grade_description: UM students from low-income families. Min CGPA 3.0.
notes: Education fund from UM's alumni association providing financial assistance to current UM undergraduate students from B40 families. One-off grant disbursed to help with living expenses and academic costs. Apply through UM Student Affairs Division.

name: Yayasan DayaDiri Scholarship
amount_description: Covers tuition and living expenses
deadline_text: April annually — April 12 (Overseas) / April 24 (Post-SPM) for 2026 intake
grade_description: Minimum 7As in SPM (A+ and A, including English and Maths). Strong academics and co-curricular record.
notes: Malaysian Bumiputera (including Pribumi Sabah, Sarawak, Orang Asli). Household income not exceeding RM11,820/month — priority for income below RM5,250/month. Post-SPM scholarship covers pre-university and undergraduate at approved local/private universities. Overseas University Scholarship covers Degree and Masters at top 20% QS-ranked universities in UK, US, or Australia. No bond for post-SPM programme. Deadline April 2026 for current intake.

name: Generali Malaysia Volare Scholarship
amount_description: Up to RM12,000 per academic year — either as cash award or full tuition coverage (student's choice)
grade_description: Open to any age. Good academic standing. First degree students only.
notes: Open to all Malaysian citizens pursuing first undergraduate degree at any local or private university. Fields: Actuarial Science, IT, Accounting, Insurance, Law, and future-proofing/insurance-related fields. Includes laptop, starter pack, mentorship, and internship opportunities. No bond. Scholars are not restricted by race or income.

name: Pembiayaan Pendidikan Boleh Ubah (PPBU) — Yayasan Bank Rakyat
amount_description: Convertible loan covering tuition and allowance — converted to full scholarship on meeting conditions
bond_description: Convertible loan — converted to grant upon graduation with required results
deadline_text: Check Bank Rakyat portal — opens annually
notes: Bumiputera applicants. Covers postgraduate (Masters and PhD) studies at local universities. One of the few postgrad-specific banking financial aid programmes in Malaysia. Loan converts to scholarship on meeting academic requirements.

name: Merdeka Award Grant for International Attachment
amount_description: Covers all costs of a 3-month attachment at an internationally recognised institution
notes: Open to Malaysians aged 22–35. Not a degree scholarship — funds a 3-month research or professional attachment abroad. Fields: Education, Environment, Health, Science & Technology, Humanities, Arts & Sports. Prestigious and competitive.

name: PIDM Undergraduate Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Up to RM30,000/year — covers tuition (up to RM20,000/year), learning aids allowance (up to RM4,000/year), and monthly allowance of RM500
grade_description: Minimum SPM 5As (with BM and English credits) + STPM 2As or Foundation/Matriculation/Diploma CGPA 3.50+. Under 25 years old.
notes: Open to all Malaysian students in financial need. Up to 20 scholars per year. Local undergraduate studies only — top QS/THE-ranked universities preferred. Fields: IT, computer science, data analytics, AI, cyber security, risk management, actuarial science, finance, economics, accounting. NO BOND — scholars are not required to repay or serve bond. Includes mentorship from PIDM senior management and optional 6-month internship.

name: Al-Bukhary International University (AIU) Scholarship
amount_description: Full scholarship — tuition, accommodation, and monthly allowance
notes: Full scholarship for students demonstrating financial need and academic merit. Priority for underprivileged students. Open to Malaysian and international students. Programmes in Business, IT, and Islamic Studies. No bond.

name: MOE Taiwan Scholarship Program
provider: Ministry of Education Taiwan / TECO Malaysia
amount_description: TWD 40,000/semester tuition + TWD 15,000–20,000/month living allowance (~RM2,200–2,900)
notes: Apply through TECO (Taipei Economic and Cultural Office) Malaysia. Two programmes: (1) Degree Studies — TWD 40,000/semester tuition + monthly stipend TWD 15,000 (undergrad) or TWD 20,000 (postgrad), approx RM2,200–2,900/month. (2) Huayu Enrichment Scholarship — for Mandarin language courses, TWD 28,000/month stipend. Deadline April 30 for degree studies, March 31 for Huayu. Open to all Malaysians.

name: Taiwan ICDF Scholarship Program
amount_description: Fully funded — return airfare, housing, tuition, insurance, textbooks + TWD 18,000–20,000/month (~RM2,600–2,900)
notes: Fully funded Masters and PhD at 18 Taiwanese universities. 29 English-taught programmes including International Agriculture, International Development, Public Health, Business Administration, International Affairs, Engineering. Covers return airfare, housing, tuition, insurance, textbooks + monthly allowance TWD 18,000 (Masters) or TWD 20,000 (PhD) (~RM2,600–2,900). Apply directly through TaiwanICDF portal.

name: Rhodes Scholarship Malaysia
amount_description: Fully funded — tuition, living expenses, and travel to Oxford University
grade_description: Exceptional academic record, leadership, and character required
notes: One of the most prestigious postgraduate scholarships globally. Study at Oxford for 1–3 years. Fully funded — tuition, accommodation, flights, living expenses. Joint programme between Rhodes Trust and Yayasan Khazanah. Selects on academic excellence, leadership, commitment to service, and character. Malaysian citizens only. Approximately 2 scholars selected per year. Applications open June, interviews August–September.

name: Russian Government Scholarship Programme
provider: Russian Centre for Science and Culture (RCSC) Malaysia
amount_description: Covers tuition, accommodation, and monthly stipend at Russian universities
notes: For undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and vocational studies at Russian universities. Instruction in Russian — language preparation course (1 year) is included. Covers tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend. Selection managed by Russian House Kuala Lumpur. All Malaysians eligible. Intake for 2026/2027 opens September 2025.

name: Türkiye Scholarships
provider: Presidency for Turks Abroad (YTB), Republic of Türkiye
amount_description: Full — monthly stipend, tuition, housing, health insurance, and university placement included
notes: Full scholarship covering undergraduate, Masters, and PhD at Turkish universities. Includes monthly stipend, full tuition, housing, health insurance, university placement assistance, Turkish language prep (1 year). One of the most generous government scholarship programmes globally — 1,000+ slots for international students annually. All Malaysians eligible. Applications open January, deadline February.

name: Manaaki New Zealand Scholarship
amount_description: Fully funded — tuition, living allowance, travel, and health insurance
notes: New Zealand government postgraduate scholarship (Masters or PhD). Fully covers tuition, living allowance (approx NZD 25,000/year), return airfare, health insurance. Open to Malaysians. Focuses on development-relevant fields aligned to New Zealand's foreign policy priorities. Highly competitive — typically 1–3 Malaysians selected per year. Very short application window — opens and closes in February.

name: ASEAN-China Young Leaders Scholarship (ACYLS)
amount_description: Full scholarship for Masters or PhD study in China
notes: Fully funded Masters, PhD, and research scholar positions at Chinese universities. Open to all ASEAN nationals including Malaysians. Apply through your home university's AUN representative or directly via AUN portal. Covers tuition, accommodation, stipend. 2026/2027 intake deadline was March 1 — check aunsec.org for next cycle.

name: Global UGRAD Exchange Program
provider: U.S. Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs / MACEE Malaysia
amount_description: Fully funded — one semester non-degree study at a US college including flights, accommodation, and allowance
notes: Fully funded one-semester non-degree exchange at a US college or university. Covers flights, accommodation, meals, health insurance, and academic fees. Targets undergraduates from underrepresented backgrounds who have not studied in the US. Provides full exposure to US academic and campus life. Apply through MACEE Malaysia. November–December application window annually.

name: Fulbright Malaysian Graduate Study & Research Program
amount_description: USD 35,000/year (~RM165,000) — covers tuition, living stipend, round-trip travel, health insurance. Maximum 2 years.
notes: US government scholarship for graduate study (Masters or PhD) at US universities. Fully funded — tuition, living stipend, round-trip travel, health insurance. Open to all Malaysian citizens. One of the most competitive international scholarships available to Malaysians — typically 5–10 scholars selected per year. Apply through MACEE Malaysia by May annually.

name: Hubert H. Humphrey Fellowship Program
amount_description: Fully funded — 10-month non-degree professional development programme in the US
notes: A Fulbright exchange for mid-career professionals in leadership positions with demonstrated commitment to public service. 10-month non-degree programme at a US university. Must be currently working in public or private sector. Requires a degree and professional experience — not for recent graduates. Fields: public policy, public health, education, environment, finance, technology and more. Apply through MACEE Malaysia. Interviews typically August, fellowship begins August the following year.

name: Yayasan Tan Sri Lee Shin Cheng Scholarship
provider: Yayasan Tan Sri Lee Shin Cheng / IOI Group
amount_description: Tuition fees and monthly allowance
grade_description: Strong academic results required
notes: Scholarship for Malaysian Chinese students (typically) pursuing undergraduate degrees at local public universities. Linked to IOI Group via Yayasan Tan Sri Lee Shin Cheng. Fields include Engineering, Medicine, Science, and related disciplines. Strong academic results required — typically top students from SPM.

name: Canada-ASEAN SEED Scholarship
amount_description: Fully funded — 4-month short-term study or research in Canada
notes: Short-term fully funded 4-month study or research exchange in Canada for ASEAN nationals including Malaysians. Covers tuition, living expenses, and travel. Must align with UN 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. Open to undergraduate and postgraduate students. Apply through EduCanada — deadlines typically February/March for the following academic year.

name: Gadang Scholarship Programme
amount_description: RM8,500/year (public university) or market rate for private universities
bond_description: 3-year employment bond with Gadang Group upon graduation
deadline_text: Check Gadang careers portal — opens annually around April–October
grade_description: Minimum 5As SPM/O-Level and 3As STPM/A-Level or CGPA 3.5 Foundation. Age 23 and below.
notes: Open to all Malaysian citizens. Full-time undergraduate at local public or private universities. Fields: Construction, Engineering (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical), Property Development, IT. Must demonstrate financial need. Includes internship with Gadang Group. Bond requires 3 years employment with any Gadang subsidiary. Apply by emailing completed form to hrd@gadang.com.my.

name: MIDF Education Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Covers tuition fees and monthly allowance — amount determined by MIDF
grade_description: Minimum CGPA 3.25 at pre-university level (Foundation/Matriculation), Diploma, or first year of Degree.
notes: Open to all Malaysian students in any field of study. Undergraduate studies at selected local universities. Minimum CGPA 3.25. Graduates may be considered for MIDF Management Associate Programme (MAP) or Graduate Apprentice Programme (GAP). Apply by downloading form from MIDF website and submitting to edu.scholarship@midf.com.my.

name: Yayasan Terengganu Scholarship (Skim Pelajar Cemerlang)
amount_description: Full scholarship covering tuition and living allowance — local and overseas
deadline_text: Check YT Klik portal — opens annually around March–May
grade_description: Minimum grade A in 8 SPM subjects including BM, BI, 3 Pure Sciences, Maths, Add Maths. CGPA 3.0 minimum for Masters, 3.5 for PhD.
notes: For anak negeri Terengganu — applicant or parent must be born in Terengganu OR have resided there for 10+ years with valid proof. Priority for B40 families. Parent/applicant must be registered voter in Terengganu. Covers Foundation through to PhD. Overseas study available for top performers (min 2A1B at Foundation/A-Level or CGPA 3.75+). Fields: Science, Engineering, Accounting, Medicine, Dentistry. Apply via ytklik.terengganu.gov.my.

name: Biasiswa Kerajaan Negeri Sabah (BKNS)
amount_description: Covers tuition fees (at public university rate) plus monthly living allowance
deadline_text: Opens multiple times per year — check biasiswa.sabah.gov.my
grade_description: Diploma: min 5As SPM + age ≤20. Degree: CGPA 3.5 STPM/Matrikulasi/Diploma + age ≤25. Masters: CGPA 3.5 Degree + age ≤30.
