notes: For Sabahans — applicant and parents must be Malaysian citizens residing in Sabah, with at least one parent originating from Sabah. Three scholarship tiers: (1) Biasiswa Anugerah TYT — for CGPA 4.0 overseas degree students. (2) Biasiswa Cemerlang BKNS — CGPA 4.0 STPM for local/overseas degree. (3) Biasiswa Perdana — Diploma through Masters. Fields: STEM, Professional Arts, Social Sciences, Applied Sciences. Apply at biasiswa.sabah.gov.my.

name: Insentif Siswa Yayasan Perak (INSISYP)
amount_description: One-off financial assistance for study commencement — amount varies by level
notes: Previously known as Dermasiswa Yayasan Perak. One-off startup grant for students commencing studies at local or overseas IPT. For anak Perak — applicant or parent born in Perak, OR residing in Perak for 10+ years. Open throughout the year. Also offers Pinjaman Pengajian Tinggi Perak (education loan) as a separate scheme. Apply via yayasanperak.gov.my. Covers Undergraduate and Postgraduate.

name: Yayasan Negeri Sembilan Education Assistance
amount_description: Bantuan Sara Hidup Mahasiswa (living allowance) + Pinjaman Pendidikan (education loan)
deadline_text: Apply through State Legislative Assembly (DUN) — check yns.gov.my
notes: For anak Negeri Sembilan. Two schemes: (1) Bantuan Sara Hidup Mahasiswa — monthly living allowance for undergraduate and postgraduate students, apply through your DUN representative. (2) Bantuan Khas Pelajar IPT Anak Nismilan — special one-off assistance for Negeri Sembilan students entering IPT. (3) Pinjaman Pendidikan — education loan for undergraduates. Contact: 06-762 8046.

name: Pinjaman Pendidikan Yayasan Kelantan Darul Naim
provider: Lembaga Biasiswa Negeri Kelantan / Yayasan Kelantan Darul Naim
amount_description: Education loan — amount varies by level of study
bond_description: Repayable loan — terms set by Yayasan Kelantan
notes: For anak Kelantan. Education loan (bukan biasiswa penuh) for undergraduate studies at local IPT. Application form available at YAKIN office (RM2.00). Also covers Bantuan Melanjutkan Pelajaran ke IPT through Majlis Agama Islam & Adat Istiadat Melayu Kelantan. Contact: 09-748 1512 for MAIK assistance.

name: Biasiswa Pinjaman Kerajaan Negeri Sarawak (BPKNS)
amount_description: Education loan covering tuition and living costs at approved institutions
bond_description: Repayable loan — terms set by Sarawak State Government
notes: For anak Sarawak (applicant or parent must be Sarawakian). Undergraduate studies at local IPTA and IPTS. State government education loan — not a full scholarship. Apply online at escholarship.sarawak.gov.my. Separate from Yayasan Sarawak scholarship (which is for Yayasan Sarawak-linked universities). Contact Suruhanjaya Perkhidmatan Negeri Sarawak: 082-236325.

name: Bantuan Awal Kemasukan IPT Kedah (BAKIPT)
amount_description: RM300 one-off payment upon entering IPT
deadline_text: Open throughout the year — March to October 2026
notes: For anak Kedah — applicant and parent must be born AND residing in Kedah, registered as SPR voter in Kedah. One-off RM300 payment for new first-semester students entering IPT (Sijil through Degree). Cannot be claimed more than once per level. Apply online via iBAKIPT system at sppnk.kedah.gov.my. Separate from SPPNK education loan (which is a full repayable loan for degree studies).

name: Pembiayaan Pendidikan SPPNK Kedah
amount_description: Up to RM14,000/year (Degree at UniSHAMS) — varies by institution and level
bond_description: Repayable loan — repayment begins 12 months after graduation
grade_description: Minimum GPA 2.49 per semester to maintain loan. Must not have existing PTPTN loan.
notes: For anak Kedah. Education loan (bukan biasiswa) covering Sijil, Diploma, and first Degree at local public universities and selected private institutions. Applicant must born and reside in Kedah, registered as SPR voter. Must terminate PTPTN before applying. Apply via iPINJAM system. Repayment begins 12 months after completing studies.

name: Yayasan JCorp Education Sponsorship
amount_description: Covers tuition fees and monthly allowance — amount varies by programme
bond_description: Bond — service with JCorp Group upon graduation
grade_description: Strong academic results. Active co-curricular record.
notes: For Johor-based students or those connected to JCorp Group companies. Undergraduate studies at local universities. JCorp is the Johor state investment arm — scholarship ties to future employment with JCorp subsidiaries. Fields include Business, Engineering, IT, Accounting. Apply at yayasanjcorp.com.my.

name: Pinjaman Penuntut Negeri Pulau Pinang (EPPN)
amount_description: Education loan — amount varies by level and institution
bond_description: Repayable loan — terms set by Penang state government
notes: For anak Pulau Pinang. State education loan for undergraduate studies at local IPT. Applicant or parent must be from Penang. Apply online at eppn.penang.gov.my. Separate from Kerajaan Negeri Pulau Pinang Bantuan Pendaftaran Pelajar ke IPT (one-off registration assistance also available). Contact: 04-650 5391.

name: Sumbangan Dana Pendidikan Negeri Perlis
amount_description: One-off financial assistance for IPT registration costs
notes: For anak Perlis. One-off financial assistance to help with IPT registration and startup costs. Applicant must be from Perlis and entering full-time studies at a recognised local IPT. Apply via Kerajaan Negeri Perlis portal. Contact Pejabat Setiausaha Kerajaan Negeri Perlis: 04-973 8800.

name: Biasiswa Kecemerlangan Menteri Besar Pahang (BKMB)
amount_description: Full scholarship covering tuition and living allowance for studies at local IPTA
deadline_text: Check Yayasan Pahang portal — opens annually after SPM results
grade_description: Excellent SPM or STPM results. Continuous funding to highest level (up to PhD) subject to academic performance.
notes: For anak Pahang (born in Pahang or parents from Pahang). Prestigious state scholarship available from SPM through to PhD at recognised local public universities. One of the few state scholarships with a pathway to postgraduate level. Introduced in 1998. Apply through Yayasan Pahang (YP) portal at yp.org.my. Separate from Yayasan Pahang education loan scheme.

name: Tabung Pendidikan Anak-Anak Syarikat Berkanun Selangor (TPASBB)
provider: Kerajaan Negeri Selangor / Dana Pendidikan Selangor
amount_description: Education fund for children of Selangor state-linked company employees
notes: Specifically for children of employees of Selangor state government companies and statutory bodies (syarikat berkanun negeri Selangor). Not open to general public — must have a parent employed by a Selangor GLC or statutory body. Apply via danapendidikan.selangor.gov.my/tpasbb.

name: Anugerah Siswazah Cemerlang Kelas Pertama Negeri Sembilan
amount_description: Cash award for First Class Honours graduates from Negeri Sembilan
grade_description: First Class Honours degree (CGPA 3.67–4.00 depending on university). Must be from Negeri Sembilan.
notes: One-time cash award (bukan biasiswa berterusan) for Negeri Sembilan students who graduate with First Class Honours. Not a scholarship for ongoing studies — this is a post-graduation recognition award. Apply through Kerajaan Negeri Sembilan after graduation. Contact: 06-765 9936.

name: Public Bank — Tan Sri Teh Hong Piow Legacy Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, books
bond_description: Yes — employment bond with Public Bank Group upon graduation
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM or equiv. Min CGPA 3.50 in STPM / Foundation / Matriculation / Diploma.
notes: Named in honour of the late Tan Sri Dato Sri Dr. Teh Hong Piow, founder of Public Bank. For 1st-year undergraduates at recognised public/private universities in Malaysia. Age 18–25. Cannot hold other financial aid. Bond to Public Bank Group after graduation.

name: Malaysia Rubber Council (MRC) Undergraduate Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, research support
bond_description: Yes — bond to rubber industry sector
grade_description: Strong SPM/STPM/Matriculation results. Malaysian citizen.
notes: For students pursuing rubber technology, polymer science, agronomy, engineering or related STEM disciplines. Part of MRC's human capital development mandate for Malaysia's rubber industry.

name: JPA Program Khas JPA-MARA (PKJM)
provider: Jabatan Perkhidmatan Awam (JPA) & Majlis Amanah Rakyat (MARA)
amount_description: Convertible loan — full tuition and allowances, convertible to scholarship on government service
grade_description: Excellent SPM 2025 results. First-time SPM candidates only.
notes: Joint JPA-MARA programme for top SPM leavers. Pinjaman Boleh Ubah (convertible loan) for pre-university through first degree at local public universities. Application window is very short — typically 2 weeks after SPM results.

name: Biasiswa Yayasan DiRaja Sultan Mizan (Terengganu)
amount_description: Full scholarship — tuition and living allowance
grade_description: Strong academic record. Terengganu residency required.
notes: Royal foundation scholarship for deserving Terengganu students. Established under the patronage of HRH Sultan Mizan Zainal Abidin. Priority to students from low-income families.

name: Zakat Selangor Education Bursary (Dermasiswa Pengajian Tinggi)
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance based on need
grade_description: Muslim asnaf (zakat recipient) categories. Pursuing higher education.
notes: Zakat-funded education assistance for Muslim students from asnaf families in Selangor. Covers tuition fee assistance for diploma and degree levels at IPTA/IPTS. Apply directly through Lembaga Zakat Selangor portal.

name: Tabung Baitulmal Sarawak — Bantuan Kemasukan IPT
amount_description: One-off grant — RM1,500–RM3,000 for IPT registration
deadline_text: Rolling — within 40 days of IPT registration
grade_description: Muslim students. Sarawak residency. Enrolled in IPTA/IPTS.
notes: One-off financial assistance for Muslim students from Sarawak entering higher education for the first time. Must apply within 40 days (including weekends) of IPT registration. For Diploma and Degree levels.

name: Yayasan Selangor — Pinjaman Pelajaran Ijazah
amount_description: Loan convertible to scholarship — tuition and allowances
bond_description: Convertible — converted to scholarship if employed in Selangor public sector
grade_description: Born or residing in Selangor. Pursuing degree at IPTA.
notes: Education loan for Selangor students at public universities. Loan can be converted to scholarship for recipients who serve in the Selangor state public service. Separate from the TPASBB fund.

name: Yayasan Hartalega Scholarship
amount_description: Partial to full — tuition and allowances
bond_description: Yes — bond to Hartalega or related industries
grade_description: Excellent academic results. Active in co-curricular activities.
notes: Scholarship offered by the CSR arm of Hartalega, one of Malaysia's largest rubber glove manufacturers. Open to Malaysians pursuing undergraduate studies at local universities. Ongoing — check TAR UMT and Hartalega official channels for current application status.

name: Mr DIY — Yayasan MR DIY Scholarship
provider: Yayasan MR DIY / MR DIY Group Berhad
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian citizen from B40/low-income family.
notes: CSR scholarship from Malaysia's largest home improvement retailer. Prioritises students from underprivileged backgrounds. Offered through partner universities including TAR UMT. Check university financial aid offices for current cycle.

name: IIUM Ummatic Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, hostel, monthly allowance RM400/month, book allowance RM250/semester
grade_description: CGPA 3.60 and above (min 15 credit hours). 2nd year and above.
notes: For poor and needy full-time undergraduate students at IIUM with excellent academic standing. Muslim and non-Muslim students eligible. Cannot hold other scholarship. For students from Muslim-minority countries, minimum CGPA 3.00 applies.

name: UM Bright Scholarship (PhD)
amount_description: Full — tuition waiver (7 semesters) + RM3,500/month stipend for 42 months
grade_description: Bachelor CGPA >3.70. Master by Research/Mixed Mode CGPA ≥3.70. Age ≤30.
notes: Fully funded PhD scholarship at Universiti Malaya. Open to Malaysian and international students. Covers full tuition fee waiver + RM3,500/month stipend. IELTS 6.5+ or TOEFL 73+ required. Apply by email: brightscholar@um.edu.my

name: UTP (PETRONAS) Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, accommodation, monthly allowance
bond_description: Yes — bond to PETRONAS or approved companies
grade_description: Min 9A in SPM or equivalent pre-university results.
notes: Merit scholarship for students enrolled at UTP in engineering, technology, business and science programs. Funded by PETRONAS. High competition — one of Malaysia's most prestigious private university scholarships.

name: UTM Graduate Research Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver RM1,000–RM2,000, varies by programme
grade_description: Enrolled in postgraduate research programme at UTM.
notes: Financial aid to attract and support postgraduate research students at UTM. Offered as partial tuition waiver. Competitive — based on research proposal quality and supervisor recommendation. Contact UTM School of Graduate Studies for details.

name: Yayasan Canselor UNITEN (YCU) Scholarship
amount_description: Full or partial — tuition fee coverage
grade_description: Malaysian students enrolled at UNITEN with financial need and academic merit.
notes: Scholarship administered by the Chancellor's Foundation at Universiti Tenaga Nasional (UNITEN). Separate from the YTN PRIME scholarship — this is a university-administered fund. Also check Tabung Amanah Zakat UNITEN (TAZU) for zakat-eligible students.

name: Eiffel Scholarship (France — Campus France)
provider: French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs / Campus France
amount_description: Full — monthly stipend €1,181 (Master) / €1,400 (PhD), flights, health insurance
deadline_text: January (annual — French institution applies on behalf of student)
grade_description: Master: max age 30. PhD: max age 35. Excellent academic record.
notes: Prestigious French government scholarship for international students to study in France. Nomination is made by a French higher education institution — students must first apply to a French university which then nominates them. Covers Master and PhD levels.

name: China Government Scholarship (CSC) — Full Scholarship
provider: Chinese Scholarship Council (CSC) / Ministry of Education China
amount_description: Full — tuition, accommodation, stipend RMB 1,400–3,500/month, health insurance
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Undergraduate: age ≤25. Master: ≤35. PhD: ≤40.
notes: Fully funded Chinese government scholarship for Malaysians to study at Chinese universities. Two tracks: Embassy Track (apply via Chinese Embassy KL) and University Track (apply directly to Chinese university). Covers all levels from Bachelor to PhD.

name: ICCR Scholarship (India — Indian Council for Cultural Relations)
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, medical insurance
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Age varies by programme level. Strong academic record.
notes: Indian government scholarship for Malaysians to study undergraduate and postgraduate programmes at Indian universities. Covers arts, science, engineering, medicine and more. Apply through the High Commission of India in Kuala Lumpur.

name: Yayasan LTAT Scholarship (Lembaga Tabung Angkatan Tentera)
amount_description: Full or partial — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Children of Armed Forces personnel. Strong academic achievement.
notes: Scholarship for children of Malaysian Armed Forces (ATM) personnel who are LTAT contributors. Open to all races. Strong emphasis on academic excellence. Check LTAT official channels for current application cycle — Anugerah Kecemerlangan Pendidikan (AKP) for SPM leavers.

name: Yayasan Razak Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian students with financial need and community service record.
notes: Named after Malaysia's 2nd Prime Minister, Yayasan Razak focuses on education, national unity and socioeconomic development. Offers scholarships and educational assistance programmes. Check official portal for current openings.

name: BSN MyRinggit Education Financing
amount_description: Loan — up to RM100,000 for local or overseas studies
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Enrolled in recognised IPTA/IPTS.
notes: Education financing scheme from Malaysia's national savings bank. Covers tuition fees and living costs for certificate, diploma and degree levels. Low interest rate. Good option for students who don't qualify for full scholarships.

name: Khazanah Watan–ACCA Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — professional exam fees, tuition, monthly allowance
grade_description: Excellent SPM results. Min 9A in SPM. Bumiputera priority but open to all.
notes: Joint programme by Yayasan Khazanah for SPM leavers to pursue ACCA professional qualification at Malaysia Professional Accountancy Centre (MyPAC). Covers full ACCA fees, tuition and monthly allowance. Leading to career in Khazanah ecosystem companies.

name: Curtin Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Minimum 5As in SPM or equivalent pre-university results.
notes: Merit-based scholarship for Malaysian and international students at Curtin Malaysia in Miri. Multiple scholarship tiers based on academic results. Separate from the Australia Awards. Apply through Curtin Malaysia admissions.

name: Heriot-Watt University Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: 20–50% tuition fee waiver, merit-based
grade_description: Strong SPM/A-Level/Foundation results.
notes: Merit scholarships for Malaysian students studying engineering, business, mathematics and computer science at Heriot-Watt Malaysia in Putrajaya. Part of Heriot-Watt University's global scholarship programme.

name: University of Nottingham Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: 25–100% tuition fee waiver based on merit
grade_description: Strong academic results in SPM, STPM, A-Levels, or Foundation.
notes: Merit scholarships for domestic students at University of Nottingham Malaysia campus in Semenyih, Selangor. Covers engineering, science, business and social science programmes. Multiple tiers available.

name: Swinburne University of Technology Sarawak Scholarship
amount_description: 10–100% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Minimum 5As in SPM or equivalent. Strong pre-university results.
notes: Merit-based scholarships for Malaysian students at Swinburne Sarawak campus in Kuching. Engineering, IT, business and design programmes. Multiple scholarship tiers. International students also eligible for some awards.

name: UOW Malaysia KDU Scholarship
provider: UOW Malaysia KDU (University of Wollongong Malaysia)
amount_description: Up to 50% tuition fee waiver
deadline_text: Rolling — each semester (Jan, April, Jun, Sep, Oct)
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.00 to maintain. Merit and sports scholarships available.
notes: Multiple scholarship streams at UOW Malaysia KDU in Petaling Jaya and Utropolis Glenmarie: Vice-Chancellor Scholarship (CGPA 3.50+), Merit Scholarship, Sports Scholarship. Application deadline 2 weeks after each semester start.

name: Dialog Group Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances, internship
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM or excellent pre-university results. Engineering/STEM preferred.
notes: Scholarship from one of Malaysia's leading integrated specialist technical services companies in the oil & gas sector. Focus on engineering, chemical engineering, mechanical engineering. Includes structured internship programme.

name: SP Setia Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, laptop
bond_description: Yes — bond to SP Setia Group
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM or equiv. Strong co-curricular record.
notes: Scholarship from Malaysia's largest property developer by market cap. Focus on built environment, architecture, engineering, quantity surveying, business and IT. Recipients expected to join SP Setia after graduation.

name: F&N Scholarship (Fraser & Neave Holdings)
amount_description: Partial to full — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Good co-curricular activities.
notes: Scholarship from F&N Malaysia, one of the leading food and beverage companies. Focus on food science, business, engineering and IT. Apply through F&N careers portal or HR department. Part of F&N's community investment programme.

name: Eco World Foundation Scholarship
provider: Eco World Foundation / Eco World Development Group
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Prioritises students from B40 backgrounds. Any field of study.
notes: CSR scholarship from Eco World Development Group, one of Malaysia's fastest-growing property developers. Focus on supporting underprivileged students. Administered through Eco World Foundation.

name: Holland Scholarship (Netherlands)
provider: Dutch Ministry of Education / Dutch universities
amount_description: EUR 5,000 one-time grant
grade_description: Bachelor or Master applicant at participating Dutch university. Age under 35.
notes: Dutch government scholarship for international students from outside the European Economic Area to study in the Netherlands. One-time EUR 5,000 grant. Applied for through the Dutch university of your choice.

name: POSCO Asia Fellowship (Korea)
amount_description: Full — tuition, stipend, flights, housing
grade_description: Undergraduate or postgraduate. Age ≤27 (UG), ≤35 (PG). Strong academics.
notes: Prestigious Korean private-sector scholarship for ASEAN students to study in Korea. Funded by POSCO steel company's foundation. Covers undergraduate and postgraduate levels at top Korean universities. One of the most generous Korean scholarships for Malaysians.

name: Rotary Foundation Scholarships (Global Grant)
provider: Rotary International Foundation (via Rotary clubs Malaysia)
amount_description: USD 15,000–30,000 per year for postgraduate study
deadline_text: Rolling — apply via local Rotary club
grade_description: Postgraduate level. Must demonstrate alignment with areas of focus. Applied through a Rotary club.
notes: Rotary Global Grants fund vocational training and postgraduate research aligned with Rotary's areas of focus: peace, disease prevention, water, maternal health, education, economic development, environment. Apply through your local Rotary club.

name: IsDB Scholarship — Human Capital Development (IsDB-HCD)
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend, health insurance, flight
grade_description: Malaysian Muslim. CGPA 3.0+. Age ≤35 for Master, ≤40 for PhD.
notes: IsDB scholarship for Muslim students from member countries including Malaysia for postgraduate study. Fields: STEM, health, economics, and development-related areas. Apply through Ministry of Higher Education or IsDB focal point in Malaysia.

name: FELDA Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances
bond_description: Yes — service bond to FELDA or plantation sector
grade_description: Children of FELDA settlers (peneroka) or FELDA employees with strong SPM/pre-university results.
notes: Scholarship for children of FELDA settlers and FELDA employees. Priority for FELDA community members from rural backgrounds. Covers agri-science, engineering, business and general degree programmes.

name: RISDA Scholarship (Skim Biasiswa RISDA)
amount_description: Full or partial — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Children of rubber smallholders or RISDA-registered families. Min 5As in SPM.
notes: Scholarship for children of rubber smallholders registered under RISDA. Priority to Bumiputera students from rubber-producing areas. Covers diploma, degree and technical/vocational education. Part of RISDA's rural uplift mandate.

name: Securities Commission Malaysia Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, laptop, flights (overseas)
bond_description: Yes — bond to SC or capital markets sector
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM. Strong STPM/A-Level/Foundation results.
notes: Prestigious scholarship from Malaysia's capital markets regulator. For outstanding students pursuing law, finance, economics, accounting, actuarial science, IT and related fields at top local and overseas universities. Bond involves working at SC or SC-approved institutions.

name: MyBrain 2.0 — MyMaster Programme
amount_description: RM7,000/year (coursework) or RM9,000/year (research) + tuition waiver
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Bachelor's degree with min CGPA 3.0 or 2nd Class Upper.
notes: Government programme under MyBrain 2.0 for Master's level study at Malaysian public universities. Coursework and research modes available. Apply through university postgraduate office after admission. Part of MyBrain Science initiative.

name: MyBrain 2.0 — MyPhD Programme
amount_description: RM12,000/year + full tuition waiver
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Master's degree with min CGPA 3.0. Age ≤45.
notes: Government programme for PhD study at Malaysian public universities. Research mode only. Monthly stipend RM1,000, annual scholarship RM12,000. Apply through university after PhD admission. Highly competitive — prioritises critical research fields.

name: Yayasan Sime Darby Postgraduate Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, research support
bond_description: Yes — bond to Sime Darby plantation sector
grade_description: Malaysian. First class or strong Master's CGPA. Research in sustainability, agri-science, environment preferred.
notes: Postgraduate research scholarship from Sime Darby's foundation. Priority fields: plantation science, sustainability, environmental science, agri-tech. Separate from the undergraduate YSD Excellence Scholarship.

name: HLAF Science & Technology Scholarship (Postgraduate)
amount_description: Partial — research grant support
grade_description: Postgraduate research in STEM fields at Malaysian public universities.
notes: Research scholarship from Hong Leong Foundation targeted at STEM postgraduate students. Separate from the undergraduate scholarship. For Master by Research and PhD at Malaysian universities. Limited slots annually.

name: Yayasan Hasanah Education Grant
amount_description: Grant-based — varies by programme
deadline_text: Rolling — quarterly (submit 16 weeks before start date)
grade_description: Focus on grassroots community impact. Students from marginalised communities.
notes: Yayasan Hasanah is Khazanah's philanthropic arm focusing on social impact. Education grants are primarily channelled through partner NGOs and community programmes rather than direct individual applications. Check hasanah.org for current programmes.

name: Tunku Abdul Rahman Foundation (YTAF) Scholarship
amount_description: Full or partial — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Malaysian citizen from B40 family. Active in community service.
notes: Foundation named after Malaysia's founding Prime Minister. Provides scholarships and educational support to deserving Malaysian students. Focus on national unity and community development. Distinct from Yayasan Tunku Abdul Rahman (YTAR) which is a different organisation.

name: Axiata Foundation Scholarship (ASEAN Tech Talent)
amount_description: Full — tuition, stipend, flights
bond_description: Yes — bond to Axiata ecosystem companies
grade_description: ASEAN citizen. Strong STEM background. Min CGPA 3.5 for postgrad.
notes: Prestigious technology scholarship from Axiata Group for ASEAN students pursuing postgraduate studies in digital innovation, telecommunications, data science and AI. Scholars gain access to Axiata ecosystem across ASEAN. Separate from the All-Star Bestari local scholarship.

name: MCA Education Scholarship (Biasiswa MCA)
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian Chinese students with financial need. Min CGPA 3.0.
notes: Education scholarship from Malaysia's Chinese community political party. Open to Malaysian Chinese students from lower-income backgrounds. Apply through MCA service centres. Also administers the Sin Chew Education Fund and Star Education Fund referrals.

name: Tun Hussein Onn National Unity Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance
grade_description: Deserving Malaysian students from all races. Financial need prioritised.
notes: Named after Malaysia's 3rd Prime Minister, this foundation scholarship focuses on national unity and helping students from all communities regardless of race or religion. Open to all deserving Malaysians from low-income families.

name: MAIAMP Perak — Biasiswa Pengajian Tinggi
provider: Majlis Agama Islam dan Adat Melayu Perak (MAIAMP)
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance for asnaf students
grade_description: Muslim students from Perak. Asnaf (zakat recipient) category.
notes: Zakat-funded education assistance from Perak's Islamic religious council. For Muslim students from Perak pursuing higher education at IPTA/IPTS. Apply through MAIAMP offices or online portal.

name: Yayasan Islam Terengganu (YIT) Education Fund
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance and allowances for asnaf
grade_description: Muslim students from Terengganu. Asnaf or low-income families.
notes: Education fund from Terengganu's Islamic foundation. Provides financial assistance to Muslim students from Terengganu pursuing higher education. Different from MAIDAM Terengganu — covers broader Islamic charitable programmes.

name: Yayasan Islam Pahang Education Assistance
amount_description: Partial — tuition and living assistance
grade_description: Muslim Pahang students. Priority to asnaf and low-income families.
notes: Education financial assistance from Pahang's Islamic foundation. For Muslim students from Pahang pursuing undergraduate studies. Apply through YIP offices in Pahang.

name: Saudi Government Scholarship (King Abdullah Programme)
provider: Royal Embassy of Saudi Arabia in Malaysia
amount_description: Full — tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, flights, health insurance
grade_description: Muslim Malaysian students. Excellent academic record. Arabic proficiency beneficial.
notes: Saudi government scholarship for Malaysian Muslim students to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate studies at Saudi Arabian universities. Covers Islamic studies, Arabic, STEM and professional fields. Apply through the Royal Saudi Embassy in Kuala Lumpur.

name: Türkiye Bursları — Science & Technology Scholarship
provider: Presidency for Turks Abroad and Related Communities (YTB)
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend TRY 800–1,200, accommodation, flights, health insurance
grade_description: All nationalities. Undergraduate age ≤21, Master ≤30, PhD ≤35. Min 70% academic score.
notes: Turkish government scholarship for international students including Malaysians to study STEM, engineering, social sciences and arts at Turkish universities. Full package scholarship. Strong competition. Apply at turkiyeburslari.gov.tr

name: ASEAN-Maybank Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, flights, insurance
bond_description: Yes — 3-year bond at Maybank, ASEAN Secretariat or ASEAN Foundation
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.00 in foundation/pre-university. All ASEAN nationalities.
notes: Full scholarship for ASEAN students to study at an AUN (ASEAN University Network) member university OUTSIDE their home country within ASEAN. Malaysians can study in Singapore, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines etc. Partnership between Maybank Foundation and ASEAN Foundation.

name: Standard Chartered Scholarship Malaysia
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, internship
bond_description: Yes — employment bond with Standard Chartered upon graduation
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM or strong STPM/Foundation/Matriculation results.
notes: Scholarship from one of Malaysia's international banks. Focus on banking, finance, economics, accounting, law and IT. Includes structured internship exposure. Apply through Standard Chartered Malaysia careers portal.

name: Boustead Holdings Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition and monthly allowance
bond_description: Yes — bond to Boustead Group companies
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM or equivalent pre-university results.
notes: Scholarship from one of Malaysia's major GLCs with diversified interests in plantations, property, pharma, heavy industries and defence. Focus on engineering, business, agri-science and IT. Check Boustead annual report CSR section for latest opening.

name: Malaysia Airports Holdings (MAHB) Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, internship
bond_description: Yes — bond to MAHB or aviation sector
grade_description: Strong SPM/pre-university results. Engineering, IT, business preferred.
notes: Scholarship from the operator of Malaysia's 39 airports including KLIA. Focus on airport management, engineering, IT, and business administration. Bond involves working at MAHB after graduation.

name: Pos Malaysia Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition and allowances
grade_description: Malaysian student from B40 or moderate-income background.
notes: Scholarship from the CSR arm of Pos Malaysia, the national postal service GLC. Focus on helping underprivileged students access higher education. Fields include IT, logistics, business and communications. Check Pos Malaysia sustainability reports for latest openings.

name: MISC Berhad Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances, internship
bond_description: Yes — bond to MISC or PETRONAS shipping group
grade_description: Strong SPM/pre-university results. Engineering, maritime, IT preferred.
notes: Scholarship from PETRONAS's integrated energy shipping company. Focus on maritime engineering, naval architecture, mechanical and electrical engineering, IT and business. Bond to MISC Group after graduation.

name: DRB-Hicom Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, internship
bond_description: Yes — bond to DRB-Hicom group companies
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM. Strong interest in automotive, engineering or defence.
notes: Scholarship from DRB-Hicom, Malaysia's major automotive, defence and logistics conglomerate (Proton, ALAM, Bank Muamalat). Focus on automotive engineering, mechanical engineering, business and IT.

name: Ann Joo Steel Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM or equivalent. Engineering / manufacturing preferred.
notes: Scholarship from one of Malaysia's largest steel manufacturers (Bursa-listed). Focus on engineering, manufacturing, metallurgy and technical fields. Confirmed active at TAR UMT. Check TAR UMT and Ann Joo official channels for current cycle.

name: Plenitude Berhad Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian student. Any field of study. Financial need considered.
notes: Scholarship from Plenitude Berhad, a Bursa-listed property developer. Confirmed active and ongoing at TAR UMT. Open to Malaysian students across disciplines. Contact TAR UMT DSA or Plenitude directly.

name: Berjaya Corporation Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition and living assistance
grade_description: Malaysian students from B40 families. All fields.
notes: CSR scholarship from Tan Sri Vincent Tan's Berjaya Corporation, one of Malaysia's largest conglomerates (retail, property, services). Focuses on underprivileged but deserving students. Also administers 7-Eleven Malaysia community fund.

name: Press Metal Aluminium Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian student. Engineering and technical fields preferred.
notes: Scholarship from Press Metal, Malaysia's largest aluminium producer and FBM KLCI constituent. Focus on engineering, metallurgy, materials science and manufacturing. Part of their CSR community investment programme.

name: IGB Corporation Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition and living assistance
grade_description: Malaysian student from underprivileged background. Any field.
notes: Scholarship from IGB Corporation, owners of Mid Valley Megamall, The Gardens and major hotel/property assets. Foundation focuses on education, healthcare and community development. One of the lesser-known but genuine corporate scholarships.

name: Universiti Sains Malaysia (USM) Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Full or partial — tuition waiver and allowances
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.5 or 1st-year intake with excellent SPM/STPM/Foundation results.
notes: USM, Malaysia's first APEX university, offers merit-based financial awards to high-achieving students. Multiple scholarship tiers available. Check USM Student Affairs Division for current scholarships and bursaries. Also administers external scholarship referrals.

name: UiTM Vice Chancellor Merit Award
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver up to 100%
grade_description: Excellent SPM results. Malaysian Bumiputera. Top academic performers.
notes: Merit award for top-performing Bumiputera students entering UiTM. Malaysia's largest university by enrolment with over 150,000 students. Also check UiTM's Skim Biasiswa Pelajar for existing students with financial need.

name: Universiti Utara Malaysia (UUM) Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver and allowances
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM or strong Foundation/Matriculation results.
notes: Merit scholarship at UUM, Malaysia's management university in Sintok, Kedah. Open to Malaysian students pursuing business, accounting, IT, law and management programmes. Also offers scholarships from external donors through Student Affairs Division.

name: UNIMAS Excellence Award
amount_description: Partial — tuition reduction and allowances
grade_description: Strong academic results. Sarawak residency an advantage.
notes: Merit-based financial awards for students at UNIMAS in Kota Samarahan, Sarawak. Priority to outstanding students from Sarawak. Multiple external scholarship opportunities also administered through UNIMAS scholarship office.

name: Universiti Malaysia Terengganu (UMT) Merit Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver and monthly allowance
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM or equivalent. Ocean science, marine, fisheries preferred.
notes: Merit scholarship at UMT, Malaysia's maritime and ocean sciences university in Kuala Terengganu. Strong in marine, fisheries, oceanography and related STEM fields. Apply through UMT Bahagian Hal Ehwal Pelajar.

name: Xiamen University Malaysia (XMUM) Scholarship
amount_description: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Min CGPA 3.00 or equivalent. Open to Malaysian and international students.
notes: Merit scholarships at the first overseas campus of China's Xiamen University, located in Sepang, Malaysia. Offers up to 100% tuition waiver for outstanding students. Open to Malaysian and international students across Engineering, Business and Sciences.

name: MAIJ Johor — Bantuan Zakat Pelajar IPT
amount_description: Partial — one-time or per-semester zakat education grant
grade_description: Muslim student. Johor residency. Asnaf category eligible.
notes: Zakat-funded education assistance from Johor's Islamic religious council for Muslim asnaf students from Johor pursuing higher education at IPTA/IPTS. Apply through MAIJ offices or online portal.

name: MAIK Kedah — Bantuan Pendidikan Tinggi Zakat
amount_description: Partial — education grant from zakat funds
grade_description: Muslim student. Kedah residency. Asnaf or low-income household.
notes: Zakat-funded education assistance from Kedah's Islamic religious council. For Muslim students from Kedah in financial need pursuing higher education. Apply through MAIK offices in Alor Setar.

name: Baitulmal Wilayah Persekutuan — Bantuan Pendidikan IPT
amount_description: Partial — per-semester education grant from zakat
grade_description: Muslim student. KL/Putrajaya/Labuan residency. Asnaf category.
notes: Baitulmal education assistance from Kuala Lumpur's Islamic religious council. For Muslim asnaf students from WP KL, Putrajaya or Labuan pursuing higher education. One of the more accessible zakat education programmes due to WP's large Muslim population.

name: MAIM Melaka — Bantuan Zakat Pengajian Tinggi
amount_description: Partial — education grant from zakat
grade_description: Muslim student. Melaka residency. Asnaf category.
notes: Zakat-funded education assistance from Melaka's Islamic religious council for Muslim students from Melaka pursuing higher education. Apply through MAIM offices in Melaka.

name: Tabung Amanah Bakun Scholarship (Sarawak)
amount_description: Full — tuition, accommodation and allowances
grade_description: Sarawakians from communities affected by the Bakun Dam project.
notes: Scholarship funded by the Bakun Hydroelectric Dam resettlement trust fund for affected communities in Sarawak, particularly Orang Ulu communities resettled from the dam catchment area. One of Malaysia's most unique community-specific scholarships.

name: Yayasan Pahang — Biasiswa Khas Menteri Besar
amount_description: Full — tuition, living allowance, flights (overseas)
grade_description: Top SPM results from Pahang. Min 8A+ required.
notes: Prestigious overseas scholarship from Pahang's foundation for top SPM students from Pahang. Separate from the standard Yayasan Pahang education loan. Very competitive — awarded to exceptional students for overseas study. Directly under Menteri Besar's patronage.

name: Agro Bank Skim Pembiayaan Pendidikan
amount_description: Loan — up to RM150,000 for agricultural/standard degree programmes
grade_description: Malaysian Bumiputera. Enrolled at recognised IPTA/IPTS. Priority to agriculture-related fields.
notes: Education financing from Agrobank, Malaysia's agricultural development bank. Priority for students pursuing agriculture, agri-business, veterinary, food science and rural development. Low interest rate. Apply at any Agrobank branch.

name: Dong Zong / UCSCAM Chinese Education Fund
provider: United Chinese School Committees' Association of Malaysia (UCSCAM) / Dong Zong
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance for Chinese school leavers
grade_description: UEC/SPM leavers from Chinese independent schools or vernacular schools. Financial need.
notes: Education fund from Malaysia's largest Chinese education associations supporting Chinese independent school graduates. Particularly important for UEC holders seeking higher education opportunities. Apply through Dong Zong or UCSCAM state chapters.

name: Tabung Amanah Naim Scholarship
amount_description: Full — academic fees and lodging
grade_description: Min 2As 1B in STPM or equivalent. Open to all. Leadership qualities required.
notes: Scholarship from Naim Holdings, a Sarawak-based construction and property company. Awards full academic fees and lodging for STPM leavers entering IPTA. Established 2005. Managed partly through JPA — check Naim Holdings website for current intake.

name: Ahmad Zaki Foundation Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition and monthly allowance
grade_description: Malaysian students from underprivileged backgrounds. Any field.
notes: Scholarship from the foundation of Ahmad Zaki Resources, a Bursa-listed construction company. Focuses on helping underprivileged Malaysian students access higher education. Part of AZRB Group's education CSR commitment.

name: Yayasan Wawasan Pelajaran (YWP) Education Fund
amount_description: Partial — tuition assistance
grade_description: Malaysian students with financial need. Diploma or degree level.
notes: Education foundation focused on supporting Malaysian students who need financial assistance to pursue higher education. Less prominent but active scholarship provider. Apply through partner institutions or directly.

name: Boh Tea Scholarship (BOH Foundation)
provider: Boh Plantations Sdn Bhd / BOH Foundation
amount_description: Partial — tuition contribution and allowance
grade_description: Malaysian students. Children of Boh estate workers prioritised.
notes: Scholarship from Malaysia's most iconic tea brand, operating the Cameron Highlands estates since 1929. Priority given to children of Boh workers and students from Cameron Highlands communities, but open to deserving Malaysians broadly.

name: UPM Graduate Research Assistantship (GRA)
amount_description: RM1,500–RM1,800/month stipend + tuition waiver
grade_description: Bachelor's with strong CGPA. Malaysian or international. Supervised research required.
notes: Research assistantship funding for postgraduate students at UPM. Managed through supervisors and faculties. GRA recipients assist with research projects in return for monthly stipend and tuition waiver. Apply by contacting potential supervisors directly.

name: USM Graduate Research Fellowship
amount_description: RM1,500/month stipend + tuition waiver
grade_description: Master's or PhD applicants with strong academic record. Malaysian and international.
notes: Research fellowship for postgraduate students at USM, Malaysia's first APEX university. Competitive — based on research proposal and supervisor match. Contact USM Institute of Postgraduate Studies (IPS) for current availability.

name: MARA Postgraduate Scholarship (Master's & PhD)
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly allowance, research support
grade_description: Bumiputera Malaysian. First-class or strong Master's result. Any field.
notes: MARA's postgraduate sponsorship for Bumiputera students pursuing Master's and PhD at local and overseas universities. Covers all costs. Separate from the TESP undergraduate programme. Apply through MARA district offices or myMara portal.

name: Yayasan Khazanah Postgraduate Fellowship
amount_description: Full — tuition, monthly stipend, research allowance
bond_description: Yes — bond to Khazanah ecosystem companies
grade_description: Strong Bachelor's and/or Master's. Malaysian. Demonstrated leadership.
notes: Postgraduate fellowship for exceptional Malaysians to pursue Master's or PhD at world-class overseas institutions. Scholars are developed for leadership roles within Khazanah's portfolio companies and the broader national economy.

name: Marshall Scholarship (UK)
amount_description: Full — tuition, living costs, flights, research grants (~£14,000/year)
grade_description: Malaysian/Commonwealth citizen. First-class or exceptional undergraduate degree. Under 26 at time of study.
notes: Prestigious UK government scholarship commemorating the Marshall Plan. Allows outstanding Malaysians to pursue any graduate programme at a UK university. One of the most competitive and prestigious scholarships available — only a handful awarded annually. Apply via British Council Malaysia.

name: SEAMEO Regional Study Award
provider: Southeast Asian Ministers of Education Organization (SEAMEO)
amount_description: Varies — tuition support and stipend for intra-ASEAN study
grade_description: ASEAN nationals. Postgraduate level. STEM and education fields.
notes: SEAMEO operates specialised centres across ASEAN (SEARCA for agriculture, RECSAM for maths/science, BIOTROP for biology, RIHED for higher education). Each centre offers fellowships and awards for intra-ASEAN study and research.

name: Jardine Scholarship (Malaysia)
amount_description: Full — tuition, maintenance, flights to Oxford or Cambridge
grade_description: Exceptional A-Levels/IB/Foundation. Malaysian citizen. Age ≤19 at entry.
notes: One of the most prestigious private scholarships available to Malaysians — full funding to study at Oxford or Cambridge via A-Levels at selected schools in HK, with university at Oxbridge. Administered by Jardine Foundation. Very small intake, extreme competition.

name: UTHM Vice Chancellor Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver and monthly allowance
grade_description: Strong SPM/pre-university results. Engineering, technical fields preferred.
notes: Merit scholarship at UTHM in Batu Pahat, Johor — Malaysia's technical university heritage institution. Strong in civil, mechanical, electrical engineering and education. Also check UTHM's external scholarship listing from industry partners.

name: UTEM Merit Award (Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka)
amount_description: Partial — tuition fee waiver
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Technical and engineering fields.
notes: Merit award for outstanding students at UTEM, a technical university in Melaka specialising in manufacturing, mechanical, electrical and computer engineering. Apply through UTEM Student Affairs Division.

name: UMP Merit Scholarship (Universiti Malaysia Pahang)
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver
grade_description: Good SPM results. Engineering, chemical engineering, industrial chemistry preferred.
notes: Merit scholarship at UMP (now UMPSA) in Gambang and Pekan, Pahang. Specialises in chemical, automotive and industrial engineering. Also supports external scholarship applications from Pahang state agencies and companies.

name: UMS Excellence Scholarship (Universiti Malaysia Sabah)
amount_description: Partial — tuition waiver and allowances
grade_description: Min 5As in SPM. Sabah applicants given priority.
notes: Merit-based scholarship at UMS in Kota Kinabalu, Sabah. Known for marine science, tropical biology, environmental science and business. Also administers external scholarship referrals from Sabah state agencies and corporations. Check UMS Bahagian Hal Ehwal Pelajar.

name: Ministry of Agriculture Malaysia — Skim Latihan Akademik Pertanian
provider: Kementerian Pertanian dan Keterjaminan Makanan Malaysia
amount_description: Full — tuition and allowances for agriculture studies
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Excellent SPM results. Agriculture, veterinary, food science.
notes: Government scholarship for students pursuing agriculture, agribusiness, veterinary science, fisheries and related food security fields at local public universities. Part of Malaysia's food security and agricultural workforce development mandate.

name: KPT Biasiswa Pelajar Asnaf (B40 University Entry)
amount_description: Full — tuition, accommodation, monthly allowance for B40 asnaf students
grade_description: Malaysian B40 / asnaf category students entering public university foundation programmes.
notes: Financial assistance under KPT's initiative to ensure B40 and asnaf students can enter public university foundation programmes without financial barriers. Automatic assessment upon IPTA entry. Different from PTPTN — this is outright assistance not a loan.

name: Kossan Rubber Industries Scholarship
amount_description: Partial — tuition contribution
grade_description: Malaysian student. Engineering and science preferred.
notes: Scholarship from Kossan Rubber, one of Malaysia's leading rubber glove manufacturers and diversified rubber products companies (FBM100). Part of their education CSR. Focus on rubber technology, engineering and manufacturing fields.

name: Yayasan Pelajaran Islam Malaysia (YPIM) Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition and monthly allowance for Islamic higher education
grade_description: Malaysian Muslim students. Strong academic and Islamic education background.
notes: Scholarship from YPIM focusing on Islamic higher education and the development of Muslim professionals in Malaysia. Supports students at IPTA and selected private Islamic institutions. Apply through YPIM offices.

name: Malaysian Communications & Multimedia Commission (MCMC) Scholarship
amount_description: Full — tuition, allowances, internship at MCMC
bond_description: Yes — bond to MCMC or communications/media sector
grade_description: Min 8As in SPM. Strong interest in communications, media, IT, engineering.
notes: Scholarship from Malaysia's communications regulator for students pursuing IT, telecommunications, engineering, law, economics and media studies. Bond requires working in the communications and multimedia industry after graduation.

name: Commonwealth Split-Site Scholarship (UK)
amount_description: Full — return flights, stipend £1,236/month, thesis allowance
deadline_text: October 2026 (2026 entry cancelled; watch for 2026–27 cycle)
grade_description: Malaysian PhD student at a Malaysian university. Min 2nd-class upper. Age guidance applies.
notes: UK government scholarship allowing Malaysian PhD students at Malaysian universities to spend 12 months at a UK university for their research. Lower competition than full Commonwealth PhD. Apply through British Council Malaysia. Note: separate from the CSFP already in database.

name: Lee Kong Chian Scholarship (Singapore Management University)
amount_description: Full — tuition and monthly stipend SGD 2,000+
grade_description: Outstanding graduates. All nationalities including Malaysian. Excellent academic track record.
notes: Prestigious postgraduate scholarship at Singapore Management University for outstanding students pursuing Master's and PhD. Named after Lee Kong Chian, Malaysian-born rubber and banking magnate. Open to Malaysians for study in Singapore.

name: Affin Bank Education Financing-i
amount_description: Loan — up to RM100,000 for approved degree programmes
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Enrolled at IPTA/IPTS. Guarantor required.
notes: Islamic education financing from Affin Bank based on Tawarruq concept. Covers tuition fees and related costs for diploma through degree. Competitive profit rate. Apply at any Affin Bank branch or through the university's partner banking portal.

name: Fulbright Foreign Language Teaching Assistant (FLTA) Program
amount_description: Full — monthly stipend, tuition, flights, health insurance
grade_description: Malaysian citizen. Age 21–29. Near-native English. Min Bachelor's degree. Teaching or related field.
notes: US government programme for young Malaysians to teach Bahasa Malaysia at a US university for one academic year while taking courses. Includes small tuition grant and opportunity to pursue further study. Administered by MACEE. Different from the Fulbright Graduate programme already in DB.

name: Astro Scholarship Award
amount_description: Up to RM40,000 per annum; covers tuition fees, living allowance, and one-off device claim
bond_description: 1 year of employment with Astro Group per year of scholarship received
grade_description: No stated grade minimum; strong academic record and leadership qualities required
notes: For Malaysian students aged 17–25 with combined household income ≤ RM5,250/month. Bond to Astro Group (1 year per year of study). Scholarship capped at 3-year degree programme.

name: FGV Holdings Scholarship Programme
amount_description: Full sponsorship from Foundation through Bachelor's degree; includes tuition fees and monthly allowance
bond_description: Bond to FGV Holdings upon graduation; duration varies by programme length
deadline_text: Applications open annually following SPM results; check career portal for current cycle
grade_description: Minimum 8As in SPM; demonstrated leadership and community involvement required
notes: For SPM leavers pursuing Foundation and Degree studies in engineering, agribusiness, or business. Also offers the Global Digital Leadership (GDL) Programme at APU (Asia Pacific University). Apply via FGV career portal.

name: Swiss Government Excellence Scholarship (ESKAS)
provider: Swiss Confederation (State Secretariat for Education, Research and Innovation – SBFI)
amount_description: Monthly stipend CHF 2,450 (from 2026) + tuition waiver + CHF 300/month accommodation allowance + health & accident insurance. Note: postdoctoral scholarships discontinued from 2027/28 cycle.
deadline_text: Applications open August–November annually; apply through Swiss Embassy Kuala Lumpur
grade_description: Must have completed a Master's degree; strong academic and research track record required
notes: For postgraduate researchers (Master's research, PhD, Postdoc) at ETH Zurich, EPFL, Swiss cantonal universities, or recognized research institutes. Open to all nationalities. Apply via the Swiss Embassy in Malaysia.

name: Swedish Institute Scholarship for Global Professionals (SISGP)
amount_description: Full tuition fees paid to university + SEK 12,000/month living allowance + travel grant SEK 10,000–15,000
deadline_text: Apply to Swedish universities Oct–Jan; SI Scholarship portal open for 2 weeks in February annually
grade_description: Minimum 3,000 hours of professional work experience required at time of SI application
notes: For Master's studies at Swedish universities. Malaysia is an explicitly listed eligible country. Requires substantial professional work experience. Applications in two stages: (1) Swedish university admissions Oct–Jan, (2) SI scholarship portal Feb.

name: Stipendium Hungaricum Scholarship Programme
provider: Hungarian Government (via Ministry of Higher Education Malaysia)
amount_description: Full tuition waiver + monthly stipend (Bachelor's: ~HUF 43,700; Master's: ~HUF 43,700–140,000; PhD: ~HUF 140,000) + accommodation + health insurance
deadline_text: Apply via MoHE nomination; nominations open November–January annually. Email: international@mohe.gov.my
grade_description: Minimum Second Class Upper / CGPA 3.00 for Master's; Bachelor's requirements vary by programme
notes: Malaysia is a partner country for this bilateral Hungarian Government scholarship. Submit online application at apply.stipendiumhungaricum.hu AND send copy to MoHE for nomination. Covers Bachelor's, Master's (including one-tier), and PhD programmes in Hungary.

name: WCT Holdings Scholarship
amount_description: Covers tuition fees and financial support; specific amount varies by intake
bond_description: Bond to WCT Holdings upon graduation
deadline_text: Applications open annually; currently closed — check wct.com.my/careers/scholarship for next cycle
grade_description: Good academic results required; engineering, construction, and QS disciplines preferred
notes: For Malaysian students pursuing civil engineering, quantity surveying, construction management, or related degrees at local universities. Includes internship and employment opportunities within WCT Group.
fields: Civil Engineering, Quantity Surveying, Construction Management

name: Sunway Group Educational Assistance Programme
amount_description: Full tuition fees + living allowance + approved incidentals; bond at 1 year of service per RM20,000 sponsored
bond_description: 1 year of service with Sunway Berhad or subsidiaries per RM20,000 of scholarship value
deadline_text: Applications open annually; check jobs.sunway.com.my/talent-programme/scholarships for current cycle
grade_description: Strong academic record required; minimum Second Class Upper each semester to maintain scholarship
notes: Distinct from Jeffrey Cheah Foundation (JCF) scholarship — this bonds scholars to Sunway Group directly. Covers Sunway institutions, Malaysian public universities, or Top 20 QS/THE universities internationally. Must not hold other scholarships concurrently.

name: Bank Islam Sadaqa House Scholarship & Education Grant
amount_description: Full tuition fees and living expenses for undergrad awardees; separate full sponsorship for Master's in Islamic Finance Practice (MIFP) at INCEIF
deadline_text: Rolling applications; check bankislam.com/sadaqa-house for current intake
grade_description: No stated grade minimum; academic potential and financial need are primary criteria
notes: Targets orphans, asnaf, and B40 students. Funded through public sadaqa contributions. Also offers a fully sponsored Postgrad scholarship for the Master's in Islamic Finance Practice (MIFP) at INCEIF University. Partner organisations: MyPAC, YEF, BJCK, and BFF.
fields: Islamic Finance (MIFP at INCEIF for Postgraduate pathway)

name: IHH Healthcare Singapore Nursing Student Sponsorship
amount_description: Full tuition fees + accommodation + RM1,000/month allowance + uniform allowance throughout studies
bond_description: 7-year employment bond with IHH Healthcare Singapore hospitals (Mount Elizabeth, Gleneagles, Parkway East, Mount Elizabeth Novena) upon graduation
deadline_text: Rolling intake; interview required — check partner universities or brightsparks.com.sg/profile/ihhhealthcare
grade_description: Interview required; for students pursuing Diploma or Degree in Nursing
notes: For Malaysian students studying nursing in Malaysia at partner institutions (UoC – University of Cyberjaya, IMC, etc.). Upon graduation, scholars are employed at IHH Healthcare Singapore hospitals. Note: 7-year bond to Singapore-based employment. First semester tuition covered retroactively after meeting CGPA threshold.
